Unit 01
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 agent [명] 대리인, 에이전트 My agent helps me find a job. - manager
2 deny [동] 부인하다, 부정하다 He will deny the bad news. admit reject
3 sigh [동] 한숨을 쉬다 She gave a long sigh of relief. - -
4 sightsee [동] 관광하다, 구경하다 We want to sightsee in Seoul today. - visit, tour
5 behavior [명] 행동, 품행 His behavior at school was very good. - action
6 remain [동] 남다, 계속~이다 Please remain in your seats. leave stay
7 cub [명] (곰·사자 등의) 새끼 The lion cub is very cute. - baby animal
8 unique [형] 독특한, 특유의 This is a very unique toy. common special
9 sidewalk [명] 인도, 보도 Walk on the sidewalk for safety. - path
10 fine [명] 벌금 [형] 좋은 The weather is fine today. bad penalty, good
11 entire [형] 전체의 I ate the entire pizza alone. part whole
12 reluctant [형] 꺼리는, 마지못한 He was reluctant to go outside. willing unwilling
13 flock [명] 떼, 무리 A flock of birds is flying. - group
14 assign [동] 맡기다, 배정하다 The teacher will assign new homework. - give
15 timid [형] 소심한, 용기가 없는 The timid boy hid behind his mom. brave shy
16 stitch [동] 꿰매다 Mom can stitch the hole in my pants. - sew
17 blossom [동] 꽃이 피다 Flowers blossom in the spring. - bloom
18 equator [명] 적도 It is very hot near the equator. - -
19 sibling [명] 형제자매 Do you have any sibling? - brother, sister
20 address [명] 주소 [동] 연설하다 Write your address on the paper. - location, speak
21 statue [명] 조각상, 동상 There is a tall statue in the park. - figure
22 equality [명] 평등 We dream of equality for everyone. - fairness
23 frown [동] 눈살을 찌푸리다 Don't frown at me like that. smile scowl
24 spacecraft [명] 우주선 The spacecraft landed on the moon. - spaceship
25 recommend [동] 추천하다 I recommend this book to you. - suggest
26 awesome [형] 아주 멋진 This movie is totally awesome! boring great, cool
27 distinguish [동] 구별하다 Can you distinguish the two colors? - tell apart
28 candidate [명] 지원자, 후보자 He is a candidate for class president. - applicant
29 fluent [형] 유창한 She is fluent in English. - smooth
30 competition [명] 대회, 시합 I won the swimming competition. - contest, race
Unit 01
쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

10 fine [명] 벌금 [형] 좋은
11 unique [형] 독특한, 특유의
12 spacecraft [명] 우주선
13 statue [명] 조각상, 동상
14 address [명] 주소 [동] 연설하다
15 agent [명] 대리인, 에이전트
16 fluent [형] 유창한
17 competition [명] 대회, 시합
18 frown [동] 눈살을 찌푸리다
19 sibling [명] 형제자매
20 reluctant [형] 꺼리는, 마지못한
21 assign [동] 맡기다, 배정하다
22 remain [동] 남다, 계속~이다
23 flock [명] 떼, 무리
24 equator [명] 적도
25 sigh [동] 한숨을 쉬다
26 cub [명] (곰·사자 등의) 새끼
27 candidate [명] 지원자, 후보자
28 recommend [동] 추천하다
29 deny [동] 부인하다, 부정하다
30 awesome [형] 아주 멋진

예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank

fineflockcandidatesightseedistinguishsiblingtimidrecommendfrownblossombehaviorremainawesomeequalityspacecraftstatueagentuniqueassigncompetitionaddressstitchsighcubentiresidewalkdenyfluentequatorreluctant

  12. Mom can the hole in my pants. ([동] 꿰매다)
  13. She is in English. ([형] 유창한)
  14. Walk on the for safety. ([명] 인도, 보도)
  15. This movie is totally ! ([형] 아주 멋진)
  16. He was to go outside. ([형] 꺼리는, 마지못한)
  17. His at school was very good. ([명] 행동, 품행)
  18. He will the bad news. ([동] 부인하다, 부정하다)
  19. I ate the pizza alone. ([형] 전체의)
  20. He is a for class president. ([명] 지원자, 후보자)
  21. The lion is very cute. ([명] (곰·사자 등의) 새끼)
  22. There is a tall in the park. ([명] 조각상, 동상)

  29. We want to in Seoul today. ([동] 관광하다, 구경하다)

Unit 01
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. reluctant ([형] 꺼리는, 마지못한)
    ① willing② equality③ remain④ agent
  2. deny ([동] 부인하다, 부정하다)
    ① candidate② equality③ admit④ sigh
  3. remain ([동] 남다, 계속~이다)
    ① recommend② leave③ address④ behavior
  4. unique ([형] 독특한, 특유의)
    ① common② sibling③ behavior④ equator
  5. awesome ([형] 아주 멋진)
    ① boring② flock③ reluctant④ sidewalk
  6. fine ([명] 벌금 [형] 좋은)
    ① sightsee② bad③ sidewalk④ blossom
  7. entire ([형] 전체의)
    ① distinguish② part③ behavior④ candidate
  8. timid ([형] 소심한, 용기가 없는)
    ① stitch② sibling③ sigh④ brave
  9. frown ([동] 눈살을 찌푸리다)
    ① smile② statue③ blossom④ remain
Unit 01
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. behavior ([명] 행동, 품행)
    ① distinguish② cub③ action④ equator
  2. assign ([동] 맡기다, 배정하다)
    ① give② remain③ sibling④ frown
  3. timid ([형] 소심한, 용기가 없는)
    ① competition② assign③ cub④ shy
  4. fine ([명] 벌금 [형] 좋은)
    ① competition② fluent③ penalty④ unique
  5. candidate ([명] 지원자, 후보자)
    ① cub② applicant③ equator④ sibling
  6. cub ([명] (곰·사자 등의) 새끼)
    ① agent② baby animal③ equator④ behavior
  7. sightsee ([동] 관광하다, 구경하다)
    ① reluctant② sibling③ visit④ behavior
  8. distinguish ([동] 구별하다)
    ① unique② tell apart③ blossom④ reluctant
  9. frown ([동] 눈살을 찌푸리다)
    ① timid② scowl③ competition④ flock
  10. competition ([명] 대회, 시합)
    ① sidewalk② timid③ contest④ agent
  11. blossom ([동] 꽃이 피다)
    ① fine② sibling③ fluent④ bloom
  12. equality ([명] 평등)
    ① fairness② unique③ blossom④ sibling
  13. spacecraft ([명] 우주선)
    ① spaceship② address③ sibling④ sightsee
  14. fluent ([형] 유창한)
    ① competition② smooth③ equality④ distinguish
  15. address ([명] 주소 [동] 연설하다)
    ① candidate② recommend③ frown④ location
  16. remain ([동] 남다, 계속~이다)
    ① statue② stay③ unique④ deny
  17. entire ([형] 전체의)
    ① sigh② whole③ frown④ fine
  18. sibling ([명] 형제자매)
    ① fine② brother③ fluent④ cub
  19. recommend ([동] 추천하다)
    ① fluent② flock③ suggest④ competition
  20. awesome ([형] 아주 멋진)
    ① entire② sibling③ deny④ great
  21. reluctant ([형] 꺼리는, 마지못한)
    ① awesome② sigh③ unwilling④ agent
  22. statue ([명] 조각상, 동상)
    ① sigh② behavior③ sibling④ figure
  23. unique ([형] 독특한, 특유의)
    ① frown② flock③ behavior④ special
  24. agent ([명] 대리인, 에이전트)
    ① manager② entire③ assign④ distinguish
  25. stitch ([동] 꿰매다)
    ① sew② agent③ remain④ sightsee
  26. sidewalk ([명] 인도, 보도)
    ① equality② flock③ path④ frown
  27. deny ([동] 부인하다, 부정하다)
    ① fluent② stitch③ unique④ reject
  28. flock ([명] 떼, 무리)
    ① sidewalk② stitch③ blossom④ group
Unit 02
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 vote [동] 투표하다 We vote for our leader. - choose
2 vast [형] 방대한, 거대한 The desert is very vast. small huge, large
3 exact [형] 정확한 Tell me the exact time. wrong correct
4 defeat [동] 이기다, 패배시키다 Our team will defeat them. lose beat, win
5 emotion [명] 감정 Love is a strong emotion. - feeling
6 ethnic [형] 민족의 I like trying ethnic food. - cultural
7 drool [동] 침을 흘리다 The baby started to drool. - -
8 currency [명] 통화, 화폐 The dollar is a famous currency. - money
9 retire [동] 은퇴하다 My dad will retire next year. - stop working
10 former [형] 예전의 She is my former teacher. present past, old
11 bamboo [명] 대나무 Pandas love to eat bamboo. - -
12 spice [명] 양념, 향신료 This soup needs more spice. - seasoning
13 aid [명] 도움, 지원 They gave aid to the poor. - help
14 silliness [명] 어리석음 Stop all this silliness now. - foolishness
15 require [동] 요구하다, 필요하다 This game will require focus. - need
16 decrease [동] 줄다, 줄이다 The price will decrease soon. increase reduce
17 recall [동] 생각나게 하다 I cannot recall his name. forget remember
18 glacier [명] 빙하 The glacier is melting slowly. - ice sheet
19 attitude [명] 태도 You have a positive attitude. - mindset
20 fund [명] 기금, 자금 We raised a fund for school. - money, stock
21 greed [명] 욕심, 탐욕 Don't let greed ruin you. - selfishness
22 attempt [명] 시도 This is my first attempt. - try
23 replace [동] 대신하다 I need to replace this battery. - change
24 ingredient [명] 재료 Sugar is a main ingredient. - part
25 barrier [명] 장벽, 장애물 There is a barrier on the road. - wall, block
26 describe [동] 묘사하다 Can you describe your dog? - explain
27 successful [형] 성공적인 He is a successful doctor. failing winning
28 ashamed [형] 부끄러운 I felt ashamed of my lie. proud sorry
29 gymnastics [명] 체조 She is good at gymnastics. - -
30 strength [명] 힘, 장점 He has the strength to win. weakness power

Unit 02
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. successful ([형] 성공적인)
    ① failing② emotion③ attempt④ fund
  2. decrease ([동] 줄다, 줄이다)
    ① increase② barrier③ describe④ emotion
  3. defeat ([동] 이기다, 패배시키다)
    ① gymnastics② lose③ ashamed④ aid
  4. recall ([동] 생각나게 하다)
    ① require② ingredient③ forget④ barrier
  5. exact ([형] 정확한)
    ① wrong② gymnastics③ spice④ emotion
  6. former ([형] 예전의)
    ① attempt② decrease③ present④ greed
  7. strength ([명] 힘, 장점)
    ① vote② require③ recall④ weakness
  8. vast ([형] 방대한, 거대한)
    ① spice② small③ ingredient④ ethnic
  9. ashamed ([형] 부끄러운)
    ① proud② describe③ spice④ ingredient
Unit 02
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. attitude ([명] 태도)
    ① strength② mindset③ currency④ vast
  2. vote ([동] 투표하다)
    ① ashamed② choose③ gymnastics④ defeat
  3. silliness ([명] 어리석음)
    ① drool② defeat③ foolishness④ require
  4. ethnic ([형] 민족의)
    ① retire② cultural③ aid④ vast
  5. glacier ([명] 빙하)
    ① ice sheet② attitude③ strength④ attempt
  6. greed ([명] 욕심, 탐욕)
    ① attitude② selfishness③ describe④ barrier
  7. ingredient ([명] 재료)
    ① currency② part③ decrease④ attempt
  8. spice ([명] 양념, 향신료)
    ① ingredient② decrease③ seasoning④ glacier
  9. barrier ([명] 장벽, 장애물)
    ① fund② replace③ wall④ ashamed
  10. ashamed ([형] 부끄러운)
    ① sorry② successful③ describe④ bamboo
  11. attempt ([명] 시도)
    ① attitude② try③ glacier④ emotion
  12. former ([형] 예전의)
    ① spice② glacier③ ethnic④ past
  13. decrease ([동] 줄다, 줄이다)
    ① attitude② reduce③ ethnic④ attempt
  14. defeat ([동] 이기다, 패배시키다)
    ① beat② glacier③ exact④ ethnic
  15. emotion ([명] 감정)
    ① fund② feeling③ strength④ aid
  16. recall ([동] 생각나게 하다)
    ① remember② exact③ strength④ successful
  17. currency ([명] 통화, 화폐)
    ① former② recall③ money④ emotion
  18. retire ([동] 은퇴하다)
    ① stop working② attempt③ currency④ exact
  19. successful ([형] 성공적인)
    ① spice② describe③ silliness④ winning
  20. strength ([명] 힘, 장점)
    ① aid② power③ ingredient④ vote
  21. describe ([동] 묘사하다)
    ① explain② gymnastics③ vast④ ashamed
  22. aid ([명] 도움, 지원)
    ① ashamed② greed③ retire④ help
  23. vast ([형] 방대한, 거대한)
    ① huge② attitude③ barrier④ exact
  24. replace ([동] 대신하다)
    ① former② change③ bamboo④ aid
  25. exact ([형] 정확한)
    ① greed② drool③ currency④ correct
  26. require ([동] 요구하다, 필요하다)
    ① need② spice③ replace④ strength
  27. fund ([명] 기금, 자금)
    ① attempt② gymnastics③ money④ former
Unit 03
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 junk [명] 쓰레기 Clean up that junk on the floor. treasure trash
2 unity [명] 통일, 통합 We need unity to win. - union
3 victim [명] 피해자 The victim was a young child. - -
4 amaze [동] 놀라게 하다 Your magic trick will amaze everyone. - surprise
5 supply [동] 공급하다 Trees supply us with oxygen. - provide
6 similar [형] 비슷한 We have similar bags. different like
7 leftover [형] 남은 We ate leftover chicken for lunch. - remaining
8 classify [동] 분류하다 Classify these books by color. - group
9 commonly [부] 흔히 This word is commonly used. rarely usually
10 define [동] 정의하다 How do you define "friend"? - explain
11 luxury [명] 사치(품), 호화로움 This watch is a big luxury. poverty richness
12 enlarge [동] 확대하다 Please enlarge this photo for me. shrink grow, expand
13 crisp [형] 바삭바삭한 These apple chips are so crisp. soft crunchy
14 unveil [동] 공개하다 They will unveil the new car. hide show, reveal
15 jealous [형] 질투하는 Don't be jealous of my toy. - envious
16 split [동] 나누다 Let's split the cake together. join divide, cut
17 trim [동] 다듬다 I need to trim my hair. - cut, clip
18 wrinkle [명] 주름 My grandma has a nice wrinkle. - line, fold
19 variety [명] 다양성 We have a variety of fruits. - diversity
20 fault [명] 잘못 It is not my fault. - mistake
21 droplet [명] 작은 물방울 Rain droplets are on the leaf. - drop
22 assistant [명] 조수, 보조 The teacher has a smart assistant. boss helper
23 maintain [동] 유지하다 You must maintain a clean room. stop keep
24 agriculture [명] 농업 Rice is important in agriculture. - farming
25 frostbite [명] 동상 Wear gloves to avoid frostbite. - -
26 stain [명] 얼룩 There is a juice stain here. - spot, mark
27 destruction [명] 파괴 The fire caused great destruction. creation ruin
28 hardly [부] 거의 ~ 아닌 I can hardly see the stars. often barely
29 transportation [명] 교통수단 The bus is my main transportation. - transit
30 complete [동] 끝내다 [형] 완전한 I want to complete this game. start finish

Unit 03
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. assistant ([명] 조수, 보조)
    ① fault② frostbite③ commonly④ boss
  2. enlarge ([동] 확대하다)
    ① shrink② supply③ split④ jealous
  3. maintain ([동] 유지하다)
    ① stop② similar③ wrinkle④ assistant
  4. commonly ([부] 흔히)
    ① crisp② junk③ assistant④ rarely
  5. destruction ([명] 파괴)
    ① creation② commonly③ junk④ stain
  6. similar ([형] 비슷한)
    ① transportation② different③ unveil④ droplet
  7. complete ([동] 끝내다 [형] 완전한)
    ① destruction② hardly③ start④ define
  8. luxury ([명] 사치(품), 호화로움)
    ① victim② poverty③ fault④ classify
  9. split ([동] 나누다)
    ① join② unity③ luxury④ complete
  10. crisp ([형] 바삭바삭한)

  11. unveil ([동] 공개하다)
    ① luxury② leftover③ classify④ hide
  12. junk ([명] 쓰레기)
    ① supply② treasure③ define④ unity
  13. hardly ([부] 거의 ~ 아닌)

Unit 03
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. define ([동] 정의하다)
    ① similar② explain③ droplet④ luxury
  2. jealous ([형] 질투하는)
    ① stain② unity③ split④ envious
  3. hardly ([부] 거의 ~ 아닌)
    ① crisp② barely③ victim④ split
  4. variety ([명] 다양성)
    ① hardly② diversity③ junk④ victim
  5. amaze ([동] 놀라게 하다)
    ① complete② stain③ leftover④ surprise
  6. classify ([동] 분류하다)
    ① junk② luxury③ trim④ group
  7. stain ([명] 얼룩)
    ① luxury② complete③ spot④ commonly
  8. junk ([명] 쓰레기)
    ① enlarge② trash③ agriculture④ unveil
  9. unveil ([동] 공개하다)
    ① fault② show③ junk④ split
  10. droplet ([명] 작은 물방울)
    ① transportation② fault③ define④ drop
  11. maintain ([동] 유지하다)
    ① keep② destruction③ unveil④ victim
  12. similar ([형] 비슷한)
    ① fault② like③ frostbite④ junk
  13. leftover ([형] 남은)
    ① junk② remaining③ classify④ victim
  14. unity ([명] 통일, 통합)
    ① wrinkle② amaze③ complete④ union
  15. split ([동] 나누다)
    ① variety② divide③ hardly④ frostbite
  16. trim ([동] 다듬다)
    ① victim② crisp③ fault④ cut
  17. crisp ([형] 바삭바삭한)
    ① crunchy② droplet③ frostbite④ similar
  18. assistant ([명] 조수, 보조)
    ① define② maintain③ supply④ helper
  19. commonly ([부] 흔히)
    ① stain② jealous③ usually④ droplet
  20. enlarge ([동] 확대하다)
    ① assistant② unity③ wrinkle④ grow
  21. destruction ([명] 파괴)
    ① ruin② agriculture③ droplet④ enlarge
  22. luxury ([명] 사치(품), 호화로움)
    ① richness② unity③ agriculture④ amaze
  23. fault ([명] 잘못)
    ① unveil② mistake③ similar④ hardly
  24. supply ([동] 공급하다)
    ① stain② trim③ provide④ crisp
  25. wrinkle ([명] 주름)
    ① complete② unity③ line④ victim
  26. transportation ([명] 교통수단)
    ① luxury② maintain③ transit④ hardly
  27. complete ([동] 끝내다 [형] 완전한)
    ① split② unity③ finish④ maintain
  28. agriculture ([명] 농업)
    ① farming② unity③ frostbite④ wrinkle
Unit 04
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 beard [명] 턱수염 My dad has a long beard. - facial hair
2 slight [형] 약간의 There is a slight problem today. big small, little
3 trait [명] 특성 Kindness is a good trait. - feature
4 drought [명] 가뭄 The plants died in the drought. flood dryness
5 delicate [형] 연약한 This glass flower is very delicate. strong fragile, weak
6 adjust [동] 조절하다 Adjust the chair to your height. - change, fix
7 admit [동] 허락하다 Please admit him to the room. deny accept
8 doubt [동] 의심하다 I doubt that he is lying. trust question
9 annoy [동] 짜증나게 하다 Loud noises annoy me a lot. please bother
10 athletic [형] 건장한 He is a very athletic person. weak sporty, strong
11 means [명] 수단 Train is a means of travel. - way, method
12 oar [명] 노 Use the oar to move boat. - paddle
13 comment [명] 언급 Write a comment on my post. - remark
14 encourage [동] 권장하다 Parents encourage their children. discourage cheer, support
15 attract [동] 마음을 끌다 Magnets attract small metal pieces. push away draw, pull
16 cruel [형] 잔인한 Don't be cruel to animals. kind mean, unkind
17 nectar [명] 꿀 Bees collect nectar from flowers. - juice
18 account [명] 계좌 I opened a new bank account. - record
19 milestone [명] 중요한 사건 Graduation is a big milestone. - landmark
20 stem [명] 줄기 This flower has a long stem. - stalk
21 complaint [명] 불만 I have a complaint about food. praise protest
22 seasoning [명] 양념 Add some seasoning to the meat. - spice
23 divisible [형] 나눌 수 있는 Ten is divisible by five. - separable
24 assignment [명] 과제 Finish your math assignment now. - homework
25 fortunately [부] 다행히 Fortunately, it did not rain today. unluckily luckily
26 nutrition [명] 영양 Milk gives us good nutrition. - food value
27 churn [동] 휘젓다 You must churn the milk well. - stir, shake
28 discourage [동] 낙담시키다 Failure should not discourage you. encourage dishearten
29 emptiness [명] 공허함 I felt emptiness in the room. fullness blankness
30 enclose [동] 둘러싸다 Please enclose the letter in paper. open surround

24 fortunately [부] 다행히

Unit 04
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

Unit 05
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 slip [동] 미끄러지다 Be careful not to slip. - slide
2 attic [명] 다락방 We keep old toys in the attic. basement loft
3 dune [명] 모래 언덕 The wind made a big dune. - sand hill
4 rural [형] 시골의 I like the quiet rural life. urban country
5 gaze [동] 응시하다 They gaze at the night stars. - stare, look
6 available [형] 이용 가능한 Is this seat available now? busy free, ready
7 ratio [명] 비율 The ratio of boys to girls is 1:1. - rate, scale
8 include [동] 포함하다 Does the price include lunch? exclude add
9 heritage [명] 유산 We must protect our world heritage. - legacy
10 graduate [동] 졸업하다 I will graduate this year. start finish school
11 tag [명] 꼬리표 Check the price tag on the shirt. - label
12 exclude [동] 제외하다 Do not exclude anyone from the game. include leave out
13 official [형] 공식적인 This is an official school rule. private formal
14 plenty [명] 많음 We have plenty of food. lack a lot, enough
15 partially [부] 부분적으로 The sun is partially hidden. fully halfway
16 valuable [형] 귀중한 This ring is very valuable. cheap precious
17 ceremony [명] 의식 The wedding ceremony was beautiful. - event, service
18 puppet [명] 인형 I like the puppet show. - doll
19 pottery [명] 도자기 We made pottery in art class. - ceramics
20 suspect [명] 용의자 The police found a suspect. - doubter
21 translate [동] 번역하다 Can you translate this into Korean? - change words
22 apologize [동] 사과하다 You should apologize to your friend. - say sorry
23 participate [동] 참여하다 Everyone should participate in the race. - join in
24 frustrated [형] 좌절감을 느끼는 I felt frustrated with the puzzle. happy upset
25 automatically [부] 자동으로 The door opens automatically. manually by itself
26 significance [명] 중요성 What is the significance of this? - importance
27 self-portrait [명] 자화상 He drew a self-portrait today. - -
28 financial [형] 재정의 He has some financial problems. - money
29 intermediate [형] 중간의 This is an intermediate level class. basic middle
30 offend [동] 불쾌하게 하다 I did not mean to offend you. please hurt, upset

Unit 06
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 unite [동] 통합하다 Let us unite for peace. divide join, link
2 ranch [명] 목장 Many cows live on the ranch. - farm
3 arouse [동] 불러일으키다 The smell of bread will arouse hunger. - wake, stir
4 due [형] 예정된 The report is due tomorrow. - expected
5 attach [동] 붙이다 Attach the photo to the paper. detach join, stick
6 avoid [동] 피하다 Avoid eating too much sugar. meet keep away
7 allowance [명] 용돈 I get a weekly allowance. - pocket money
8 export [동] 수출하다 Korea will export many cars. import sell abroad
9 boundary [명] 경계(선) We must not cross the boundary. - line, border
10 peak [명] 산꼭대기 We reached the mountain peak. bottom top
11 leak [동] 새다 The water will leak from the pipe. - drip
12 vocation [명] 직업 Teaching is his true vocation. - job, work
13 expand [동] 확장하다 Metals expand when they are hot. shrink grow, swell
14 rapidly [부] 빨리 The city is growing rapidly. slowly fast, quickly
15 announce [동] 발표하다 The teacher will announce the winner. hide tell, report
16 discount [명] 할인 Can I get a student discount? - price cut
17 talkative [형] 수다스러운 She is a very talkative girl. quiet chatty
18 transport [동] 수송하다 Ships transport goods across the sea. - carry, move
19 suddenly [부] 갑자기 Suddenly, it started to rain. slowly all at once
20 range [명] 다양성 We sell a wide range of toys. - variety
21 regard [동] 여기다 I regard him as a friend. ignore think of
22 recently [부] 최근에 I recently moved to this town. long ago lately
23 aboard [부] 탑승한 Welcome aboard the train! off on board
24 detention [명] 잡아 둠 He got detention for being late. - stay late
25 qualify [동] 자격을 얻다 You qualify for the final race. - be fit
26 poisonous [형] 독이 있는 That snake is very poisonous. safe toxic
27 awareness [명] 알고 있음 We need more environmental awareness. - knowledge
28 embarrassing [형] 난처하게 하는 That was an embarrassing mistake. proud shameful
29 according [부] 따라서 Everything went according to plan. - as said
30 rather [부] 꽤, 상당히 It is rather cold today. - quite

학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. expand ([동] 확장하다)
    ① vocation② rather③ leak④ shrink
  2. attach ([동] 붙이다)
    ① embarrassing② export③ detach④ recently
  3. avoid ([동] 피하다)
    ① expand② meet③ rather④ due
  4. unite ([동] 통합하다)
    ① due② divide③ arouse④ export
  5. talkative ([형] 수다스러운)
    ① unite② discount③ quiet④ expand
  6. poisonous ([형] 독이 있는)
    ① qualify② safe③ due④ awareness
  7. regard ([동] 여기다)
    ① ignore② peak③ discount④ expand
  8. aboard ([부] 탑승한)
    ① regard② allowance③ poisonous④ off
  9. suddenly ([부] 갑자기)
    ① transport② announce③ slowly④ arouse
  10. embarrassing ([형] 난처하게 하는)
    ① ranch② proud③ suddenly④ expand
  11. announce ([동] 발표하다)
    ① detention② leak③ hide④ transport
  12. recently ([부] 최근에)
    ① rather② long ago③ regard④ rapidly
  13. rapidly ([부] 빨리)
    ① slowly② transport③ detention④ poisonous
  14. peak ([명] 산꼭대기)
    ① regard② bottom③ according④ due

    ① import② allowance③ peak④ poisonous

Unit 07
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 blame [동] 비난하다 Don't blame me for the broken toy. praise fault
2 sparkle [동] 반짝이다 The stars sparkle in the sky. - shine, glow
3 contents [명] 내용물 Empty the contents of the bag. - inside
4 praise [동] 칭찬하다 Teachers praise hard-working students. blame admire
5 steady [형] 꾸준한 He walked at a steady pace. shaky constant
6 soak [동] 담그다 Soak the beans in water. dry wet
7 scenic [형] 경치가 좋은 We took the scenic route home. - beautiful
8 twilight [명] 황혼 The sky is purple at twilight. dawn dusk
9 energetic [형] 활기찬 He is an energetic soccer player. tired active
10 comfort [명] 편안함 I love the comfort of home. pain ease
11 admire [동] 존경하다 I admire my brave grandfather. despise respect
12 treadmill [명] 러닝머신 I run on the treadmill daily. - -
13 baggage [명] 짐 We have too much baggage. - luggage
14 parcel [명] 소포 I sent a parcel to my aunt. - package
15 calculate [동] 계산하다 Can you calculate this math problem? - count
16 emperor [명] 황제 The emperor lived in a palace. - ruler, king
17 challenging [형] 힘든 This puzzle is very challenging. easy difficult
18 envelope [명] 봉투 Put the letter in the envelope. - cover
19 admission [명] 입장 How much is the admission fee? exit entry
20 instruct [동] 가르치다 She will instruct us in art. - teach
21 equipment [명] 장비 We need new sports equipment. - gear, tools
22 communicate [동] 의사소통하다 We communicate through emails. - talk, share
23 endangered [형] 멸종 위기의 Tigers are an endangered species. safe dying out
24 irritate [동] 자극하다 Dust can irritate your eyes. soothe annoy
25 attractive [형] 매력적인 This is an attractive flower garden. ugly pretty, cute
26 excitement [명] 신남 There was excitement in the air. boredom thrill
27 unless [접] ~ 아니면 I won't go unless you go. - except if
28 moreover [부] 게다가 It is cheap; moreover, it is good. - also, plus
29 whatever [대] 무엇이든 You can do whatever you want. - anything
30 resolve [동] 해결하다 We must resolve this fight. - fix, settle

Unit 07
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. scenic ([형] 경치가 좋은)
    ① equipment② beautiful③ treadmill④ instruct
  2. admire ([동] 존경하다)
    ① respect② energetic③ moreover④ irritate
  3. emperor ([명] 황제)
    ① excitement② scenic③ ruler④ admire
  4. challenging ([형] 힘든)
    ① baggage② attractive③ praise④ difficult
  5. sparkle ([동] 반짝이다)
    ① whatever② twilight③ soak④ shine
  6. communicate ([동] 의사소통하다)
    ① steady② attractive③ talk④ whatever
  7. energetic ([형] 활기찬)
    ① blame② active③ moreover④ sparkle
  8. excitement ([명] 신남)
    ① thrill② twilight③ treadmill④ contents
  9. contents ([명] 내용물)
    ① inside② energetic③ emperor④ instruct
  10. admission ([명] 입장)
    ① entry② comfort③ contents④ moreover
  11. praise ([동] 칭찬하다)
    ① challenging② admire③ energetic④ contents
  12. instruct ([동] 가르치다)
    ① comfort② excitement③ sparkle④ teach
  13. endangered ([형] 멸종 위기의)
    ① excitement② dying out③ twilight④ treadmill
  14. attractive ([형] 매력적인)
    ① comfort② whatever③ admission④ pretty
  15. soak ([동] 담그다)
    ① resolve② scenic③ baggage④ wet
  16. whatever ([대] 무엇이든)
    ① anything② envelope③ communicate④ moreover
  17. resolve ([동] 해결하다)
    ① attractive② fix③ unless④ envelope
  18. comfort ([명] 편안함)
    ① steady② twilight③ blame④ ease
  19. equipment ([명] 장비)
    ① gear② admire③ baggage④ communicate
  20. twilight ([명] 황혼)
    ① resolve② dusk③ endangered④ attractive
  21. calculate ([동] 계산하다)
    ① comfort② count③ envelope④ challenging
  22. irritate ([동] 자극하다)
    ① calculate② unless③ annoy④ steady
  23. envelope ([명] 봉투)
    ① steady② cover③ admission④ attractive
  24. steady ([형] 꾸준한)
    ① moreover② blame③ constant④ twilight
  25. moreover ([부] 게다가)
    ① also② whatever③ treadmill④ praise
  26. parcel ([명] 소포)
    ① package② excitement③ challenging④ comfort
  27. blame ([동] 비난하다)
    ① instruct② envelope③ baggage④ fault
  28. unless ([접] ~ 아니면)
    ① moreover② except if③ calculate④ instruct
  29. baggage ([명] 짐)
    ① challenging② envelope③ luggage④ equipment
Unit 08
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 bare [형] 벌거벗은 The trees are bare in winter. covered naked
2 abound [동] 아주 많다 Fish abound in this river. - be plenty
3 mash [동] 으깨다 Mash the potatoes for dinner. - crush
4 sneeze [동] 재채기하다 Dust makes me sneeze. - -
5 tease [동] 놀리다 Do not tease your sister. praise mock
6 treasure [명] 보물 They found a hidden treasure. junk prize
7 curiously [부] 호기심으로 He looked at me curiously. - strangely
8 occur [동] 일어나다 When did the accident occur? - happen
9 criticize [동] 비평하다 It is easy to criticize others. praise judge
10 function [동] 작동하다 This machine can function well. - work
11 keen [형] 열망하는 She is keen on learning music. dull eager
12 surge [동] 밀려오다 A surge of water hit the beach. - rush
13 swap [동] 교환하다 Let's swap our cards. keep trade
14 intense [형] 강렬한 The sun's heat is intense. weak strong
15 pollen [명] 꽃가루 Bees carry pollen to flowers. - -
16 invisible [형] 보이지 않는 Air is invisible to us. clear hidden
17 swollen [형] 부어오른 My finger is red and swollen. - puffy
18 migrate [동] 이동하다 Birds migrate to the south. stay move
19 symptom [명] 증상 Coughing is a cold symptom. - sign
20 addict [명] 중독자 He is a game addict. - -
21 symbolize [동] 상징하다 Red roses symbolize love. - represent
22 supervise [동] 감독하다 Teachers supervise the school trip. - watch, lead
23 exhausted [형] 기진맥진한 I was exhausted after the run. fresh very tired
24 tremendous [형] 엄청난 You did a tremendous job! tiny huge, great
25 supportive [형] 도와주는 My family is very supportive. - helpful
26 memorable [형] 잊지 못할 It was a memorable trip. boring special
27 imaginative [형] 창의적인 She is an imaginative artist. - creative
28 authority [명] 권한 The king has the authority. - power
29 phenomenon [명] 현상 Snow is a natural phenomenon. - event
30 specialty [명] 전문 요리 Pizza is this restaurant's specialty. - special dish

Unit 09
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 carve [동] 조각하다 I will carve a pumpkin. - cut, shape
2 sticky [형] 끈적끈적한 My hands are sticky from candy. smooth gluey
3 moving [형] 감동적인 That was a very moving story. boring touching
4 career [명] 직업 She wants a career in music. - job, work
5 canal [명] 운하 Boats go through the canal. - waterway
6 endure [동] 참다 We must endure the cold winter. quit bear, stand
7 mass [명] 큰 덩어리 A mass of snow fell down. - block, pile
8 obey [동] 복종하다 You must obey the school rules. disobey follow
9 orbit [명] 궤도 The Earth is in orbit. - path
10 arrange [동] 정돈하다 Arrange the books on the shelf. - set, plan
11 fraction [명] 분수 We learned about fraction in math. whole part
12 potion [명] 물약 The witch made a magic potion. - magic drink
13 tremble [동] 떨다 I tremble when I am scared. - shake
14 procedure [명] 절차 Follow the safety procedure. - process, step
15 vivid [형] 선명한 I had a vivid dream last night. dull bright, clear
16 celebrate [동] 축하하다 Let's celebrate your birthday! - party, enjoy
17 willing [형] 기꺼이 하는 I am willing to help you. reluctant ready
18 upcoming [형] 다가오는 Are you ready for upcoming test? past next, soon
19 burden [명] 무거운 짐 This bag is a heavy burden. - load
20 criminal [명] 범죄자 The police caught the criminal. - robber
21 presence [명] 존재 I feel your presence here. absence being
22 definite [형] 확실한 We need a definite answer. unsure sure, clear
23 worthwhile [형] 가치 있는 Helping others is worthwhile. useless valuable
24 terminal [명] 터미널 We are at the bus terminal. - station
25 strengthen [동] 강화하다 Exercise will strengthen your body. weaken build up
26 hibernate [동] 겨울잠 자다 Bears hibernate in the winter. wake sleep
27 brilliant [형] 뛰어난 That is a brilliant idea! stupid bright, smart
28 exhibition [명] 전시회 I went to a robot exhibition. - show, display
29 complicated [형] 복잡한 This math problem is complicated. simple complex
30 appreciate [동] 고마워하다 I appreciate your help. - thank

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

upcomingwillingcelebrateprocedurecomplicatedarrangetremblefractionpresencecanalvividcareercarvemovingbrilliantdefinitemasshibernatestickyappreciateexhibitionobeypotionterminalstrengthenburdenendureorbitworthwhilecriminal
  1. We are at the bus . ([명] 터미널)
  2. The Earth is in . ([명] 궤도)
  3. Are you ready for test? ([형] 다가오는)
  4. This bag is a heavy . ([명] 무거운 짐)
  5. I when I am scared. ([동] 떨다)
  6. Follow the safety . ([명] 절차)
  7. Boats go through the . ([명] 운하)
  8. The witch made a magic . ([명] 물약)
  9. We must the cold winter. ([동] 참다)

Unit 09
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. strengthen ([동] 강화하다)
    ① hibernate② carve③ presence④ weaken
  2. brilliant ([형] 뛰어난)
    ① appreciate② worthwhile③ stupid④ potion
  3. worthwhile ([형] 가치 있는)
    ① orbit② moving③ fraction④ useless
  4. complicated ([형] 복잡한)
    ① tremble② brilliant③ procedure④ simple
  5. definite ([형] 확실한)
    ① hibernate② unsure③ carve④ career
  6. willing ([형] 기꺼이 하는)
    ① worthwhile② appreciate③ reluctant④ orbit
  7. endure ([동] 참다)
    ① quit② exhibition③ strengthen④ brilliant
  8. obey ([동] 복종하다)
    ① disobey② criminal③ upcoming④ mass
  9. hibernate ([동] 겨울잠 자다)
    ① moving② terminal③ wake④ obey
  10. presence ([명] 존재)
    ① moving② absence③ strengthen④ endure
  11. moving ([형] 감동적인)
    ① exhibition② boring③ orbit④ vivid
  12. fraction ([명] 분수)
    ① whole② orbit③ appreciate④ definite
  13. sticky ([형] 끈적끈적한)
    ① arrange② smooth③ fraction④ hibernate
  14. upcoming ([형] 다가오는)
    ① burden② past③ obey④ willing
  15. vivid ([형] 선명한)
    ① career② potion③ dull④ hibernate

  1. willing ([형] 기꺼이 하는)

  2. brilliant ([형] 뛰어난)
    ① bright② carve③ exhibition④ fraction

    ① career② orbit③ criminal④ gluey

    ① celebrate② criminal③ sleep④ sticky

    ① endure② strengthen③ vivid④ sure
  15. arrange ([동] 정돈하다)
    ① set② definite③ celebrate④ carve
  16. potion ([명] 물약)
    ① criminal② sticky③ magic drink④ mass
  17. orbit ([명] 궤도)
    ① worthwhile② vivid③ procedure④ path
  18. terminal ([명] 터미널)
    ① station② orbit③ canal④ potion
  19. presence ([명] 존재)
    ① being② fraction③ career④ arrange
  20. criminal ([명] 범죄자)
    ① tremble② orbit③ exhibition④ robber

Unit 10
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 owe [동] 빚지다 I owe you five dollars. - -
2 troop [명] 군대 The troop moved to the camp. - soldiers
3 stiff [형] 뻣뻣한 My neck is very stiff. soft hard
4 burst [동] 터지다 The balloon will burst soon. - pop
5 flatten [동] 납작하게 하다 Flatten the dough with your hands. - press
6 blush [동] 얼굴을 붉히다 She started to blush. - turn red
7 budget [명] 예산 We have a small travel budget. - money plan
8 declare [동] 선언하다 They declare the winner today. - state, say
9 radiation [명] 방사선 Sun gives off radiation. - rays
10 grasp [동] 꽉 잡다 Grasp the rope tightly. drop hold, grip
11 appoint [동] 임명하다 They appoint him as leader. - name, pick
12 decline [동] 줄어들다 The number of students will decline. increase go down
13 artificial [형] 인공의 I like artificial flowers. natural man-made
14 latitude [명] 위도 Check the latitude on the map. - -
15 decay [동] 썩다 Sugar can make teeth decay. - rot
16 quarrel [동] 다투다 Don't quarrel with your friends. agree fight, argue
17 ongoing [형] 계속되는 The game is still ongoing. finished continuing
18 deserve [동] 받을 만하다 You deserve a big reward. - merit
19 offensive [형] 불쾌한 His words were very offensive. polite rude, mean
20 charge [동] 청구하다 How much do you charge? - bill
21 improperly [부] 부적절하게 The machine was used improperly. correctly wrongly
22 particular [형] 특정한 I like this particular book. general specific
23 indeed [부] 정말 Thank you very much indeed. - really, truly
24 transition [명] 변화 Life is full of transition. - change
25 immediate [형] 즉각적인 I need an immediate answer. slow instant
26 prosperity [명] 번영 We wish for peace and prosperity. poverty wealth
27 breathtaking [형] 숨이 막히는 The view was truly breathtaking. boring amazing
28 bothersome [형] 성가신 Flying bugs are very bothersome. pleasant annoying
29 reasonable [형] 합리적인 That is a reasonable price. unfair fair
30 treat [동] 다루다 Treat your toys with care. - handle

Unit 11
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 wildlife [명] 야생 동물 We saw wildlife in the forest. - animals
2 temperature [명] 온도 Check the temperature today. - heat
3 appear [동] 나타나다 A rainbow will appear soon. vanish show up
4 flipper [명] 지느러미발 The penguin moved its flipper. - fin
5 definitely [부] 확실히 I will definitely be there. maybe surely
6 threat [명] 위협 Pollution is a threat to Earth. safety danger
7 organize [동] 조직하다 Let's organize a surprise party. - plan, arrange
8 permanent [형] 영구적인 This is a permanent marker. temporary lasting
9 cavity [명] 충치 I have a small cavity. - hole
10 current [형] 현재의 What is your current address? past present
11 refund [명] 환불 I want to get a refund. - money back
12 refer [동] 나타내다 Please refer to the map. - mean, mention
13 creepy [형] 오싹한 This old house is creepy. - scary
14 otherwise [부] 그렇지 않으면 Run, otherwise you will be late. - -
15 reflect [동] 반사하다 Mirrors reflect our faces. - mirror
16 bunch [명] 다발 I bought a bunch of bananas. - group, set
17 plump [형] 통통한 The baby has plump cheeks. thin chubby
18 regardless [부] 개의치 않고 I will go regardless of rain. - anyway
19 disaster [명] 참사 The flood was a big disaster. - tragedy
20 tricky [형] 어려운 This is a tricky question. easy difficult
21 contrast [명] 차이 I like the color contrast. - difference
22 sway [동] 흔들다 The trees sway in the wind. - swing
23 sincerely [부] 진심으로 I sincerely hope you win. - truly
24 circumstance [명] 상황 The circumstance has changed. - situation
25 court [명] 경기장 Meet me at the basketball court. - field
26 livestock [명] 가축 Farmers take care of livestock. - farm animals
27 distribute [동] 분배하다 Please distribute these papers. collect give out
28 dependent [형] 의존하는 Babies are dependent on parents. free relying
29 somewhat [부] 약간 I am somewhat tired today. very a little
30 launch [동] 발사하다 They will launch a rocket. stop set off
Unit 11
쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

No.단어뜻3번 쓰기
1 refund [명] 환불
2 cavity [명] 충치
3 livestock [명] 가축
4 sincerely [부] 진심으로
5 circumstance [명] 상황
6 appear [동] 나타나다
7 disaster [명] 참사
8 reflect [동] 반사하다

cavityflipperregardlesscurrentthreattrickydistributesincerelydisasterrefundtemperatureappearcontrastlivestockcircumstanceswaydefinitelyrefersomewhatorganizedependentplumpreflectbunchwildlifepermanentlaunchcreepyotherwisecourt

  2. We saw in the forest. ([명] 야생 동물)
  3. I hope you win. ([부] 진심으로)
  4. The penguin moved its . ([명] 지느러미발)
  5. Farmers take care of . ([명] 가축)
  6. The flood was a big . ([명] 참사)
  7. Run, you will be late. ([부] 그렇지 않으면)
  8. This is a question. ([형] 어려운)
  9. Please these papers. ([동] 분배하다)

  15. Please to the map. ([동] 나타내다)

  17. Babies are on parents. ([형] 의존하는)
  18. Meet me at the basketball . ([명] 경기장)
  19. What is your address? ([형] 현재의)
  20. The baby has cheeks. ([형] 통통한)
  21. A rainbow will soon. ([동] 나타나다)
  22. This old house is . ([형] 오싹한)

Unit 11
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

  1. threat ([명] 위협)
    ① safety② plump③ circumstance④ cavity
  2. definitely ([부] 확실히)
    ① permanent② cavity③ maybe④ somewhat
  3. distribute ([동] 분배하다)
    ① somewhat② circumstance③ threat④ collect
  4. somewhat ([부] 약간)
    ① current② very③ organize④ otherwise
  5. current ([형] 현재의)
    ① court② past③ creepy④ regardless
  6. launch ([동] 발사하다)
    ① dependent② refund③ stop④ refer
  7. plump ([형] 통통한)
    ① thin② disaster③ tricky④ cavity
  8. appear ([동] 나타나다)
    ① otherwise② threat③ vanish④ distribute
  9. tricky ([형] 어려운)
    ① refer② wildlife③ somewhat④ easy
  10. permanent ([형] 영구적인)
    ① temporary② refund③ dependent④ creepy
  11. dependent ([형] 의존하는)
    ① free② plump③ contrast④ reflect

Unit 12
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 raw [형] 익히지 않은 Do not eat raw meat. cooked uncooked
2 detective [명] 탐정 The detective solved the case. - investigator
3 resemble [동] 닮다 You resemble your father. - look like
4 extinct [형] 멸종된 Dinosaurs are extinct animals. living dead
5 ordinary [형] 평범한 It was just an ordinary day. special normal
6 chemical [형] 화학의 Use natural cleaners, not chemical ones. - -
7 celebrity [명] 유명인 He is a famous celebrity. - star
8 freckle [명] 주근깨 She has a small freckle. - spot
9 entitle [동] 제목을 붙이다 How will you entitle your poem? - name
10 core [명] 속, 심 Don't eat the apple core. - center
11 massive [형] 거대한 Look at that massive rock! tiny huge, giant
12 conclude [동] 결론 내리다 We must conclude the meeting. start end, finish
13 productive [형] 생산적인 Have a productive day! lazy busy, useful
14 despite [전] ~에도 불구하고 He ran despite the rain. - in spite of
15 random [형] 무작위의 Pick a random card. planned accidental
16 eager [형] 간절히 바라는 I am eager to start. - keen, ready
17 sapling [명] 어린나무 We planted a tiny sapling. - young tree
18 exclaim [동] 외치다 "Wow!" he did exclaim. whisper cry out, shout
19 rate [동] 평가하다 Rate this movie out of five. - grade, score
20 solid [형] 단단한 Ice is solid water. liquid hard
21 eventually [부] 마침내 Eventually, we reached the top. - finally, at last
22 suspicious [형] 의심스러운 That man looks very suspicious. trusting fishy
23 efficient [형] 효율적인 He is an efficient worker. wasteful helpful
24 destination [명] 목적지 What is our final destination? - goal, stop
25 establish [동] 설립하다 They want to establish a school. - set up, found
26 underneath [전] ~의 밑에 The cat is underneath the bed. above below, under
27 fundamental [형] 근본적인 Reading is a fundamental skill. - basic
28 existence [명] 존재 I believe in the existence of fairies. - being
29 percussion [명] 타악기 I play percussion in the band. - drums
30 commercial [명] 광고 I saw a funny commercial. - ad

    ① underneath② normal③ extinct④ freckle
  26. despite ([전] ~에도 불구하고)
    ① random② existence③ chemical④ in spite of
  27. extinct ([형] 멸종된)
    ① eager② dead③ detective④ solid
  28. establish ([동] 설립하다)
    ① fundamental② eager③ set up④ underneath
  29. suspicious ([형] 의심스러운)
    ① exclaim② fishy③ conclude④ rate
Unit 13
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 unfair [형] 부당한 It is unfair to play alone. fair mean
2 scientific [형] 과학적인 Use a scientific way to test. - -
3 expense [명] 비용 The travel expense was very high. - cost, price
4 status [명] 신분, 지위 What is your social status? - rank, level
5 imitate [동] 흉내 내다 Monkeys can imitate people well. - copy
6 acquire [동] 습득하다 I want to acquire new skills. lose get, learn
7 bushy [형] 무성한 The squirrel has a bushy tail. thin thick
8 reform [명] 개혁 We need a school reform now. - change
9 stack [동] 쌓다 Please stack the boxes here. - pile up
10 estate [명] 재산 He has a large estate. - property
11 consist [동] 구성되다 Water consist of oxygen and hydrogen. - be made of
12 crumb [명] 부스러기 Don't leave a bread crumb. - tiny bit
13 encounter [동] 마주치다 I did encounter a bear today. avoid meet
14 disguise [동] 변장하다 He will disguise himself as a dog. show hide
15 surgery [명] 수술 The doctor did a safe surgery. - operation
16 infection [명] 감염 Clean the cut to stop infection. health sickness
17 shove [동] 밀치다 Do not shove your friends. pull push
18 cemetery [명] 묘지 The old cemetery is very quiet. - graveyard
19 opposite [형] 반대의 Hot is the opposite of cold. same different
20 dull [형] 지루한 The movie was very dull. fun boring
21 self-esteem [명] 자부심 You should have high self-esteem. - pride
22 prescription [명] 처방전 Take this prescription to the store. - note
23 geological [형] 지질학의 We studied geological maps today. - -
24 community [명] 공동체 Help people in your community. - group
25 throughout [전] ~ 내내 It rained throughout the day. - all through
26 frightened [형] 겁먹은 The cat was frightened by dogs. brave scared
27 adequate [형] 적당한 The food was adequate for us. short enough
28 gorgeous [형] 아주 예쁜 You look gorgeous in that dress! ugly beautiful
29 representative [명] 대표자 He is our class representative. - agent
30 oral [형] 입의, 말의 We have an oral test today. written spoken

Unit 14
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 drain [동] 빼내다 Drain the water from the sink. fill empty
2 exotic [형] 이국적인 I like exotic fruits like mangoes. common unusual
3 knead [동] 반죽하다 Knead the bread dough well. - press, mix
4 ashore [부] 해안으로 The boat came ashore slowly. - to land
5 cabbage [명] 양배추 Mom bought a fresh cabbage. - vegetable
6 unlike [전] ~와 다른 He is unlike his twin brother. like different
7 chemistry [명] 화학 We study chemistry in science class. - -
8 frill [명] 주름 장식 Her dress has a pink frill. - decoration
9 via [전] ~을 통하여 We go to Paris via London. - through
10 artwork [명] 미술품 This artwork is very colorful. - art
11 submit [동] 제출하다 Submit your report by Friday. take hand in
12 reward [명] 보상 Hard work brings a good reward. - prize
13 specific [형] 구체적인 Give me a specific example. general clear
14 likewise [부] 똑같이 He cried, and I did likewise. - also
15 clarify [동] 명확히 하다 Please clarify your last sentence. confuse explain
16 distinct [형] 뚜렷한 I heard a distinct sound. fuzzy clear
17 diverse [형] 다양한 The students have diverse ideas. same various
18 anxiety [명] 걱정 He felt anxiety before the test. calm worry
19 splendid [형] 멋진 We had a splendid time today. bad great
20 involve [동] 포함하다 This game will involve many people. - include
21 widespread [형] 널리 퍼진 The news was very widespread. rare common
22 impatient [형] 참을성 없는 Don't be so impatient for dinner. patient restless
23 dawn [명] 새벽 The sun rises at dawn. sunset daybreak
24 temporary [형] 임시의 This is a temporary job. permanent short-term
25 approximate [형] 대략의 The approximate time is five. exact rough
26 psychology [명] 심리학 She wants to study psychology. - mind study
27 extinguish [동] 불을 끄다 Extinguish the campfire before leaving. light put out
28 decompose [동] 분해되다 Leaves decompose on the ground. build rot
29 alongside [전] ~ 옆에 Walk alongside the river bank. - next to
30 constant [형] 일정한 He makes a constant noise. changing steady

Unit 14
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. approximate ([형] 대략의)
    ① impatient② exact③ reward④ dawn
  2. dawn ([명] 새벽)
    ① sunset② alongside③ chemistry④ via
  3. drain ([동] 빼내다)
    ① dawn② ashore③ frill④ fill
  4. splendid ([형] 멋진)
    ① reward② psychology③ unlike④ bad
  5. widespread ([형] 널리 퍼진)
    ① distinct② rare③ splendid④ cabbage
  6. decompose ([동] 분해되다)
    ① build② chemistry③ knead④ approximate
  7. diverse ([형] 다양한)
    ① frill② splendid③ same④ alongside
  8. exotic ([형] 이국적인)
    ① common② extinguish③ chemistry④ via
  9. constant ([형] 일정한)
    ① extinguish② splendid③ changing④ widespread
  10. distinct ([형] 뚜렷한)
    ① impatient② fuzzy③ alongside④ submit
  11. impatient ([형] 참을성 없는)
    ① patient② dawn③ specific④ cabbage
  12. submit ([동] 제출하다)
    ① take② decompose③ extinguish④ widespread
  13. specific ([형] 구체적인)
    ① cabbage② unlike③ likewise④ general
  14. temporary ([형] 임시의)
    ① specific② diverse③ permanent④ drain
  15. clarify ([동] 명확히 하다)
    ① confuse② alongside③ constant④ artwork
  16. anxiety ([명] 걱정)
    ① psychology② frill③ calm④ reward
  17. unlike ([전] ~와 다른)
    ① ashore② submit③ like④ distinct
  18. extinguish ([동] 불을 끄다)
    ① frill② distinct③ light④ cabbage

동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. cabbage ([명] 양배추)
    ① vegetable② decompose③ widespread④ knead
  2. specific ([형] 구체적인)
    ① clarify② exotic③ psychology④ clear
  3. involve ([동] 포함하다)
    ① psychology② dawn③ likewise④ include
  4. submit ([동] 제출하다)
    ① temporary② decompose③ hand in④ diverse
  5. reward ([명] 보상)
    ① clarify② distinct③ artwork④ prize
  6. knead ([동] 반죽하다)
    ① press② ashore③ specific④ diverse
  7. impatient ([형] 참을성 없는)
    ① psychology② chemistry③ restless④ splendid
  8. constant ([형] 일정한)
    ① steady② decompose③ unlike④ artwork
  9. decompose ([동] 분해되다)
    ① drain② clarify③ alongside④ rot
  10. temporary ([형] 임시의)
    ① reward② short-term③ splendid④ alongside
  11. diverse ([형] 다양한)
    ① knead② extinguish③ involve④ various
  12. ashore ([부] 해안으로)
    ① anxiety② to land③ distinct④ widespread
  13. extinguish ([동] 불을 끄다)
    ① put out② distinct③ chemistry④ frill
  14. widespread ([형] 널리 퍼진)
    ① common② frill③ dawn④ impatient
  15. dawn ([명] 새벽)
    ① approximate② submit③ chemistry④ daybreak
  16. frill ([명] 주름 장식)
    ① decompose② decoration③ ashore④ alongside
  17. psychology ([명] 심리학)
    ① specific② submit③ mind study④ unlike
  18. alongside ([전] ~ 옆에)
    ① next to② distinct③ chemistry④ cabbage
  19. exotic ([형] 이국적인)
    ① diverse② widespread③ unusual④ unlike

    ① distinct② empty③ decompose④ submit
  21. clarify ([동] 명확히 하다)

    ① worry② specific③ clarify④ distinct

    ① reward② different③ anxiety④ drain

    ① artwork② knead③ rough④ impatient

    ① great② submit③ dawn④ widespread

    ① psychology② also③ impatient④ temporary

Unit 15
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 loose [형] 느슨한 My tooth is very loose. tight baggy
2 approve [동] 승인하다 Will you approve my plan? reject say yes
3 interrupt [동] 방해하다 Do not interrupt when I talk. continue stop
4 unsure [형] 불확실한 I am unsure of the way. certain not sure
5 chewy [형] 질긴 This steak is very chewy. soft tough
6 owner [명] 주인 Who is the owner of dog? - boss
7 crucial [형] 중대한 This is a crucial goal. minor important
8 asset [명] 자산 Health is a great asset. debt treasure
9 numerous [형] 많은 I have numerous books here. few many
10 carriage [명] 객차 The carriage was full of people. - coach
11 devote [동] 바치다 Devote your time to study. - give
12 devious [형] 정직하지 못한 He has a devious plan. honest sneaky
13 immune [형] 면역의 I am immune to this cold. weak safe
14 obvious [형] 분명한 The answer is very obvious. hidden clear
15 prejudice [명] 편견 We must not have prejudice. - bias
16 abundance [명] 풍부 There is an abundance of fish. lack plenty
17 originate [동] 유래하다 The story did originate here. end start
18 sacrifice [명] 희생 Her sacrifice helped the team. - loss
19 meanwhile [부] 그 동안에 Meanwhile, the cat ran away. - in the middle
20 operate [동] 작동하다 Can you operate this machine? stop run
21 anniversary [명] 기념일 Happy first school anniversary! - special day
22 advancement [명] 진보 Technology shows great advancement. - progress
23 observation [명] 관찰 Make a close observation. - watching
24 immersion [명] 몰입 Try total immersion in English. - deep study
25 accommodation [명] 숙박 시설 The accommodation was very comfortable. - lodging
26 occasionally [부] 가끔 I eat pizza occasionally. often sometimes
27 reputation [명] 평판 This school has a good reputation. - name
28 fascinate [동] 매료시키다 Space stories fascinate me. bore charm
29 acknowledge [동] 인정하다 Acknowledge your mistake right now. deny admit
30 vessel [명] 배, 선박 The large vessel is sailing. - ship, boat

Unit 16
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 edge [명] 모서리 Don't stand on the edge. center side, rim
2 unusual [형] 특이한 That is a very unusual bird. common odd
3 warning [명] 경고 Listen to the safety warning. - caution
4 guilty [형] 유죄의 He felt guilty for lying. innocent blamed
5 prick [동] 찌르다 Be careful not to prick finger. - poke
6 revision [명] 수정 I made a revision today. - change
7 oppose [동] 반대하다 They will oppose the new law. agree against
8 adolescent [형] 청소년의 He is an adolescent boy. adult teenage
9 pirate [명] 해적 The pirate found the gold. - sea robber
10 certain [형] 확실한 I am certain he's coming. unsure sure
11 govern [동] 통치하다 The king will govern well. obey rule
12 guarantee [명] 보증 There is no guarantee here. - promise
13 demonstrate [동] 보여주다 Can you demonstrate the dance? hide show
14 eternal [형] 영원한 True love is eternal. temporary forever
15 abuse [동] 남용하다 Do not abuse your power. - misuse
16 acclaim [동] 칭송하다 People acclaim the brave hero. blame praise
17 peculiar [형] 이상한 It has a peculiar smell. normal strange
18 disinfect [동] 소독하다 Disinfect the wound with alcohol. dirty clean
19 altitude [명] 고도 The plane flew at high altitude. - height
20 desperate [형] 필사적인 He was desperate for water. calm eager
21 prescribe [동] 처방하다 Doctors prescribe medicine for patients. - order
22 aggressive [형] 공격적인 The dog is very aggressive. gentle mean
23 association [명] 협회 Join the soccer association today. - club, union
24 furious [형] 화가 난 Mom was furious with me. happy angry
25 attendance [명] 출석 My attendance at school is good. absence presence
26 comfortable [형] 편안한 This sofa is very comfortable. uneasy cozy
27 manufacturer [명] 제조사 Ask the car manufacturer about it. - maker
28 bilingualism [명] 2개 국어 구사 Bilingualism is a great skill. - -
29 critical [형] 비판적인, 중대한 This is a critical problem. - serious
30 dispose of [구동사] 처리하다 Dispose of the trash properly. keep get rid of

22 manufacturer [명] 제조사
23 altitude [명] 고도
24 disinfect [동] 소독하다

desperateassociationpiraterevisiongoverndemonstratefuriousbilingualismdispose ofcriticalunusualguiltycertaincomfortableaggressiveacclaimeternalguaranteeedgeabusedisinfectwarningaltitudeprescribepeculiaradolescentmanufactureropposeattendanceprick

  3. Ask the car about it. ([명] 제조사)

  11. I am he's coming. ([형] 확실한)

  17. the trash properly. ([구동사] 처리하다)

  20. True love is . ([형] 영원한)
  21. People the brave hero. ([동] 칭송하다)

Unit 16
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. comfortable ([형] 편안한)
    ① acclaim② uneasy③ attendance④ prescribe
  2. govern ([동] 통치하다)
    ① acclaim② attendance③ obey④ peculiar
  3. acclaim ([동] 칭송하다)
    ① prick② certain③ bilingualism④ blame
  4. eternal ([형] 영원한)
    ① acclaim② temporary③ dispose of④ guarantee
  5. peculiar ([형] 이상한)
    ① acclaim② abuse③ normal④ unusual
  6. certain ([형] 확실한)
    ① unsure② peculiar③ dispose of④ govern
  7. oppose ([동] 반대하다)
    ① agree② association③ demonstrate④ furious
  8. demonstrate ([동] 보여주다)
    ① disinfect② warning③ hide④ certain
  9. disinfect ([동] 소독하다)
    ① unusual② dirty③ altitude④ guarantee
  10. aggressive ([형] 공격적인)
    ① abuse② gentle③ guilty④ guarantee
  11. desperate ([형] 필사적인)
    ① pirate② revision③ calm④ furious
  12. furious ([형] 화가 난)
    ① altitude② happy③ unusual④ peculiar
  13. edge ([명] 모서리)
    ① guilty② peculiar③ center④ manufacturer
  14. dispose of ([구동사] 처리하다)
    ① critical② desperate③ keep④ demonstrate
  15. unusual ([형] 특이한)
    ① comfortable② adolescent③ common④ altitude
  16. guilty ([형] 유죄의)
    ① prescribe② aggressive③ comfortable④ innocent
  17. adolescent ([형] 청소년의)
    ① dispose of② acclaim③ adult④ certain
  18. attendance ([명] 출석)
    ① bilingualism② pirate③ absence④ comfortable

Unit 17
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 gem [명] 보석 The ring has a red gem. - jewel
2 distance [명] 거리 Keep a safe distance from cars. - space, gap
3 countless [형] 무수한 I saw countless stars at night. few many
4 competitor [명] 경쟁자 He is a strong competitor. partner rival
5 plow [동] 갈다 Farmers plow the fields in spring. - dig, farm
6 overdue [형] 기한이 지난 This library book is overdue. early late
7 burrow [명] 굴 The rabbit lives in a burrow. - hole, nest
8 retain [동] 유지하다 You should retain your good habits. lose keep, hold
9 bias [명] 편견 We must judge without any bias. fairness prejudice
10 upset [형] 속상한 She is upset about the test. happy sad, angry
11 initiate [동] 시작하다 They will initiate the new project. end start, begin
12 engage [동] 참여하다 Students engage in the school play. quit join
13 fabulous [형] 멋진 You look fabulous today! awful great, super
14 captivity [명] 감금 Animals should not live in captivity. freedom prison
15 feminine [형] 여성의 Pink is often called a feminine color. masculine girly
16 innocent [형] 순수한 The little child is very innocent. guilty pure, clean
17 arrogant [형] 거만한 Don't be arrogant about your score. humble proud
18 pioneer [명] 개척자 He is a pioneer in space. - leader, first
19 flattered [형] 우쭐한 I felt flattered by your praise. - pleased
20 observe [동] 관찰하다 Observe how the plant grows. ignore watch, see
21 excessive [형] 과도한 Excessive sugar is bad for health. little too much
22 absolutely [부] 틀림없이 I am absolutely sure about it. - totally, surely
23 organization [명] 단체 She works for a peace organization. - group, club
24 department [명] 부서 Go to the toy department now. - section
25 vegetarian [명] 채식주의자 He is a vegetarian and eats vegetables. - -
26 civilization [명] 문명 We studied the ancient Greek civilization. - culture
27 estimate [동] 추정하다 Can you estimate the total cost? - guess
28 prominent [형] 두드러진 He is a prominent music teacher. hidden famous, clear
29 disadvantage [명] 약점 Small size can be a disadvantage. advantage weakness
30 assemble [동] 모이다 All students assemble in the hall. scatter gather, join

단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 curl [동] 곱슬하게 하다 My hair will curl in rain. straighten bend, twist
2 usage [명] 사용 Internet usage is very high now. - use
3 germ [명] 세균 Wash hands to kill the germ. - bug, bacteria
4 groan [명] 신음 He gave a groan of pain. - moan
5 expose [동] 드러내다 Do not expose skin to sun. hide show
6 aspect [명] 측면 Consider every aspect of the problem. - side, part
7 sacred [형] 신성한 The cow is a sacred animal. - holy
8 dizzy [형] 어지러운 I feel dizzy after the ride. steady shaky
9 plumber [명] 배관공 The plumber fixed the leaky sink. - -
10 excuse [명] 변명 Don't make an excuse for being late. - reason
11 minimum [형] 최소의 The minimum age is ten years. maximum lowest
12 maximum [형] 최대의 The maximum speed is 60 km. minimum highest
13 strain [동] 혹사하다 Don't strain your eyes in dark. relax stretch, pull
14 prom [명] 댄스파티 They wore pretty dresses for prom. - party, dance
15 assure [동] 보장하다 I assure you everything is fine. - promise
16 assume [동] 추정하다 Do not assume he is happy. - guess, think
17 aspire [동] 열망하다 I aspire to be a doctor. - hope, want
18 hostile [형] 적대적인 He gave me a hostile look. friendly mean, unkind
19 stimulate [동] 자극하다 Games can stimulate your brain. - stir, wake
20 border [명] 국경 We crossed the border into Canada. - edge, line
21 confident [형] 자신감 있는 Be confident when you speak English. shy sure
22 accountant [명] 회계사 An accountant works with money numbers. - -
23 recipient [명] 받는 사람 She was the recipient of a gift. giver receiver
24 certificate [명] 증명서 I won a certificate for art. - card, paper
25 construction [명] 건설 The bridge is under construction now. - building
26 hospitable [형] 친절한 The local people were very hospitable. mean friendly, kind
27 collaborate [동] 협력하다 Let's collaborate on the science project. - work together
28 identical [형] 똑같은 We have identical blue bags. different same, twin
29 repellent [명] 방충제 Use bug repellent in the woods. - bug spray
30 fair [명] 박람회 [형] 공정한 We went to the book fair. unfair show, just

Unit 18
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. fair ([명] 박람회 [형] 공정한)
    ① hospitable② unfair③ expose④ assume
  2. curl ([동] 곱슬하게 하다)
    ① accountant② certificate③ straighten④ fair
  3. hostile ([형] 적대적인)
    ① accountant② fair③ friendly④ sacred
  4. expose ([동] 드러내다)
    ① fair② hide③ usage④ plumber
  5. recipient ([명] 받는 사람)
    ① groan② sacred③ giver④ construction
  6. minimum ([형] 최소의)
    ① aspire② expose③ repellent④ maximum
  7. identical ([형] 똑같은)
    ① different② hospitable③ prom④ germ
  8. dizzy ([형] 어지러운)
    ① maximum② steady③ repellent④ stimulate
  9. maximum ([형] 최대의)
    ① groan② stimulate③ strain④ minimum
  10. hospitable ([형] 친절한)
    ① collaborate② prom③ mean④ germ
  11. strain ([동] 혹사하다)
    ① maximum② germ③ relax④ assure
  12. confident ([형] 자신감 있는)
    ① shy② fair③ curl④ groan

    ① groan② building③ dizzy④ aspect

    ① expose② excuse③ bend④ germ

    ① friendly② groan③ collaborate④ aspect

    ① certificate② stimulate③ hope④ excuse
  18. recipient ([명] 받는 사람)
    ① usage② fair③ receiver④ identical
  19. fair ([명] 박람회 [형] 공정한)
    ① show② assure③ curl④ border
  20. expose ([동] 드러내다)

Unit 19
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 gravity [명] 중력 Gravity keeps us on the ground. - pull
2 exchange [동] 교환하다 Let's exchange our phone numbers. keep trade, swap
3 confused [형] 혼란스러운 I am confused by this question. clear puzzled
4 poke [동] 쿡 찌르다 Don't poke me with your finger. - prick, push
5 satisfy [동] 만족시키다 This meal will satisfy my hunger. upset please
6 dignity [명] 위엄 Treat everyone with respect and dignity. - pride, honor
7 vibrate [동] 진동하다 The phone started to vibrate slowly. - shake
8 superb [형] 최고의 You did a superb job today! bad great, excellent
9 depict [동] 그리다 The book will depict old Seoul. - show, draw
10 fade [동] 바래다 Colors will fade in the sun. glow pale, vanish
11 convince [동] 확신시키다 I will convince him to come. doubt prove
12 socialize [동] 어울리다 Kids need time to socialize together. - mix, talk
13 vanish [동] 사라지다 The bird did vanish in sky. appear disappear
14 restrict [동] 제한하다 They restrict food in the room. open limit, stop
15 perceive [동] 인지하다 I perceive a change in air. - see, feel
16 absurd [형] 터무니없는 That is a very absurd story. smart silly, crazy
17 defend [동] 방어하다 We must defend our school team. attack protect, guard
18 descent [명] 혈통 He is of Korean descent. - family, blood
19 commute [동] 통근하다 He has a long commute daily. stay travel
20 tune [동] 조율하다 Please tune the piano for me. - fix, set
21 arrangement [명] 정돈 I like the flower arrangement here. - plan, layout
22 alternative [명] 대안 Is there an alternative plan? - choice
23 illuminate [동] 비추다 Candles illuminate the dark room. darken light up
24 ingenious [형] 기발한 He found an ingenious way home. stupid clever, smart
25 inspiration [명] 영감 Nature is a great inspiration. - idea
26 enthusiasm [명] 열정 Show your enthusiasm for the game! boredom passion, zest
27 sufficient [형] 충분한 We have sufficient water for today. short enough, plenty
28 indiscriminate [형] 무분별한 Avoid indiscriminate use of paper. selective random
29 subsequent [형] 그 다음의 The subsequent days were very sunny. previous following
30 atmosphere [명] 분위기 The restaurant has a cozy atmosphere. - air, mood

  18. Treat everyone with respect and . ([명] 위엄)
  19. We have water for today. ([형] 충분한)
  20. Is there an plan? ([명] 대안)

Unit 19
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. convince ([동] 확신시키다)
    ① exchange② confused③ doubt④ subsequent
  2. confused ([형] 혼란스러운)
    ① indiscriminate② clear③ commute④ arrangement
  3. exchange ([동] 교환하다)
    ① convince② defend③ keep④ restrict
  4. vanish ([동] 사라지다)
    ① superb② enthusiasm③ subsequent④ appear
  5. superb ([형] 최고의)
    ① bad② tune③ socialize④ confused
  6. illuminate ([동] 비추다)
    ① commute② darken③ inspiration④ socialize
  7. sufficient ([형] 충분한)
    ① perceive② absurd③ restrict④ short
  8. fade ([동] 바래다)
    ① illuminate② satisfy③ vibrate④ glow
  9. satisfy ([동] 만족시키다)
    ① superb② upset③ gravity④ illuminate
  10. subsequent ([형] 그 다음의)
    ① descent② vibrate③ previous④ atmosphere
  11. commute ([동] 통근하다)
    ① stay② indiscriminate③ gravity④ restrict
  12. absurd ([형] 터무니없는)
    ① fade② smart③ enthusiasm④ defend
  13. indiscriminate ([형] 무분별한)
    ① illuminate② socialize③ vibrate④ selective
  14. restrict ([동] 제한하다)
    ① open② absurd③ exchange④ inspiration
  15. enthusiasm ([명] 열정)
    ① confused② boredom③ inspiration④ tune
  16. defend ([동] 방어하다)
    ① descent② commute③ attack④ restrict
  17. ingenious ([형] 기발한)
    ① stupid② depict③ vibrate④ descent

Unit 20
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 temple [명] 신전 We visited an old stone temple. - church
2 vine [명] 덩굴 식물 Grapes grow on a long vine. - plant
3 coral [명] 산호 Colorful fish live in the coral. - reef
4 grind [동] 갈다 Grind the coffee beans every morning. - crush
5 amuse [동] 즐겁게 하다 The clown will amuse the children. bore entertain
6 thicken [동] 걸쭉하게 하다 Add flour to thicken the soup. thin stiffen
7 tension [명] 긴장 There was tension before the race. peace stress
8 consult [동] 상담하다 You should consult a doctor first. - ask, check
9 courtesy [명] 예의 Always speak with respect and courtesy. rudeness kindness
10 rake [동] 긁어모으다 Let's rake the dry leaves together. scatter gather
11 exile [명] 망명 He lived in exile for years. - banish
12 permit [동] 허가하다 Does school permit phone use here? ban allow
13 interact [동] 상호 작용하다 Small children interact through play. - talk, mix
14 emit [동] 내뿜다 Stars emit light in the dark. absorb give off
15 surplus [명] 나머지 We have a surplus of apples. short extra, left
16 bustling [형] 북적거리는 The market is very bustling today. quiet busy
17 recharge [동] 재충전하다 Recharge your phone before the trip. empty fill up
18 bizarre [형] 기이한 I saw a very bizarre dream. normal weird, odd
19 fertile [형] 비옥한 The farm has very fertile land. poor rich
20 significant [형] 중요한 This is a significant day today. minor important
21 tendency [명] 경향 He has a tendency to sleep late. - habit
22 threaten [동] 위협하다 Large dogs might threaten small cats. protect scare
23 fragrance [명] 향기 I love the fragrance of roses. stink scent, smell
24 linguistic [형] 언어의 She has great linguistic skills. - language
25 wasteland [명] 황무지 Nothing can grow in the wasteland. garden desert
26 eligible [형] 자격이 있는 You are eligible for the prize. unable fit, able
27 ultimately [부] 궁극적으로 Ultimately, we want to be happy. first finally
28 interfere [동] 간섭하다 Do not interfere in my work. - meddle, stop
29 free [동] 풀어 주다 Please free the bird from cage. catch set loose
30 fanatic [명] 열광적인 팬 He is a soccer fanatic. - big fan

Unit 21
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 fee [명] 요금 You must pay the entry fee. - cost, price
2 amusing [형] 재미있는 That was a very amusing story. boring funny, fun
3 possess [동] 소유하다 I possess a very rare card. lose have, own
4 relieve [동] 완화하다 This pill will relieve your pain. hurt ease, help
5 angle [명] 각도 Look at it from this angle. - corner
6 gender [명] 성별 Please write your gender here. - sex
7 remove [동] 제거하다 Remove your hat in the room. add take away
8 intend [동] 의도하다 I did not intend to cry. - mean, plan
9 lack [명] 부족 A lack of sleep is bad. plenty shortage
10 humid [형] 습한 The air is very humid today. dry damp, wet
11 roam [동] 돌아다니다 Tigers roam in the deep forest. stay wander
12 firm [명] 회사 [형] 확고한 He has a firm handshake. weak company, hard
13 weird [형] 기이한 That is a very weird sound. normal strange, odd
14 vinegar [명] 식초 Vinegar has a very sour taste. - sour liquid
15 crunch [동] 오도독 씹다 I like to crunch on ice. - chew
16 haunt [동] 나타나다 Ghosts haunt the old dark castle. - follow
17 benefit [명] 이득 Reading has many great benefits. loss advantage
18 raisin [명] 건포도 I like raisin bread for breakfast. - dried grape
19 fungus [명] 균류, 곰팡이 A mushroom is a type of fungus. - mold
20 fortune [명] 운, 재산 He made a large fortune. - luck, wealth
21 register [동] 등록하다 Register for the soccer camp now. - sign up
22 analyze [동] 분석하다 Analyze the data very carefully. - study, test
23 qualification [명] 자격 He has the right qualification. - ability
24 explosion [명] 폭발 I heard a big loud explosion. - blast
25 enormous [형] 거대한 Look at that enormous whale! tiny huge, giant
26 surround [동] 둘러싸다 Mountains surround our small town. - circle
27 innovative [형] 혁신적인 This is a very innovative idea. old new, fresh
28 furthermore [부] 더욱이 He is smart; furthermore, he is kind. - also, besides
29 autobiography [명] 자서전 I am reading her autobiography. - life story
30 individual [명] 개인 Every individual has a name. group person

쓰기 연습Write & Remember

17 possess [동] 소유하다
18 remove [동] 제거하다
19 humid [형] 습한
20 explosion [명] 폭발

22 register [동] 등록하다
23 lack [명] 부족
24 fortune [명] 운, 재산
25 crunch [동] 오도독 씹다
26 analyze [동] 분석하다
27 individual [명] 개인

Unit 22
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 fame [명] 명성 He found fame as a singer. - glory
2 dye [동] 염색하다 I want to dye my hair. - color
3 examine [동] 조사하다 The doctor will examine you now. ignore check, look
4 gradual [형] 점진적인 There was a gradual change. sudden slow
5 wage [명] 임금 He earns a high weekly wage. - pay, salary
6 depress [동] 우울하게 하다 Rain can depress some people. cheer sadden
7 rotten [형] 썩은 This apple is totally rotten. fresh bad, spoiled
8 detect [동] 발견하다 Can you detect any smell? miss find, spot
9 enroll [동] 등록하다 Enroll in the art class today. - join, sign
10 impact [명] 영향 Books have a big impact. - effect
11 choir [명] 합창단 I sing in the school choir. - singing group
12 voyage [명] 항해 They went on a long voyage. - journey, trip
13 consume [동] 소비하다 We consume a lot of water. save use up, eat
14 outstanding [형] 뛰어난 Your art work is outstanding! poor great, super
15 abandon [동] 버리다 Do not abandon your pets. keep leave, quit
16 extreme [형] 극도의 The heat was very extreme today. slight very great
17 forward [부] 앞으로 Please step forward one by one. backward ahead
18 credible [형] 믿을 수 있는 Is that story really credible? fishy believable
19 mammal [명] 포유동물 A whale is a large mammal. - animal
20 appearance [명] 외모 Do not judge by appearance. - look
21 generally [부] 일반적으로 I generally wake up at seven. rarely mostly, usually
22 terrific [형] 아주 멋진 You look terrific in that hat! awful great, super
23 hesitate [동] 망설이다 Do not hesitate to ask me. - wait, pause
24 primitive [형] 원시의 They used primitive stone tools. modern early, old
25 obviously [부] 분명히 Obviously, he is very happy. - clearly
26 miniature [명] 축소 모형 I collect miniature toy cars. giant small model
27 personality [명] 성격 She has a very bright personality. - character
28 passionate [형] 열정적인 He is passionate about soccer. bored eager
29 flavor [명] 맛 I like the chocolate flavor. - taste
30 matter [동] 중요하다 Your opinion does matter here. - count

    ① matter② wage③ gradual④ check
  30. outstanding ([형] 뛰어난)
    ① terrific② great③ detect④ rotten
Unit 23
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 dice [명] 주사위 Roll the dice to start. - cube
2 rude [형] 무례한 It is rude to shout here. polite mean, impolite
3 cargo [명] 화물 The ship carries heavy cargo. - goods, load
4 evaporate [동] 증발하다 Water will evaporate in the sun. freeze dry up
5 absorb [동] 흡수하다 Sponges absorb water very well. - soak up
6 weed [명] 잡초 Pull the weed from the garden. flower wild plant
7 cultured [형] 교양 있는 He is a very cultured man. rude polite
8 routine [명] 일상 My morning routine is simple. - habit
9 costly [형] 비싼 Buying a car is costly. cheap expensive
10 alert [형] 경계하는 Be alert for any danger. sleepy watchful
11 collar [명] 칼라, 깃 The dog has a red collar. - neckband
12 ban [동] 금지하다 Schools ban cell phones in class. allow stop, forbid
13 quite [부] 꽤 It is quite cold today. - very, rather
14 overseas [부] 해외로 I want to travel overseas. home abroad
15 privacy [명] 사생활 I need some privacy right now. - private life
16 arise [동] 발생하다 Many problems may arise today. - happen, occur
17 inspire [동] 영감을 주다 You inspire me to draw. - move, cheer
18 souvenir [명] 기념품 I bought a souvenir in Jeju. - gift, token
19 probably [부] 아마도 I will probably go home soon. surely maybe
20 central [형] 중심의 The station is in central Seoul. side middle
21 overhear [동] 우연히 듣다 I did overhear their secret. - hear
22 hexagon [명] 육각형 A bee cell is a hexagon. - -
23 previous [형] 이전의 Check the previous page now. next past, old
24 renowned [형] 유명한 He is a renowned doctor. unknown famous
25 convenient [형] 편리한 This app is very convenient. hard handy, easy
26 pedestrian [명] 보행자 The pedestrian crossed the road. driver walker
27 beneath [전] 아래에 The cat is beneath the chair. above under, below
28 dwarf [명] 난쟁이 The story has a kind dwarf. giant tiny person
29 anticipate [동] 예상하다 We anticipate a sunny day. - expect
30 regret [동] 후회하다 I regret eating too much. - feel sorry

  8. renowned ([형] 유명한)
    ① pedestrian② unknown③ rude④ privacy

Unit 24
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 fossil [명] 화석 I found a fish fossil. - old bone
2 thorn [명] 가시 The rose has a sharp thorn. - spike
3 wheat [명] 밀 Bread is made from wheat. - grain
4 disabled [형] 장애를 가진 He helps disabled people daily. able -
5 scar [명] 흉터 I have a scar on my knee. - mark
6 lately [부] 최근에 I have been busy lately. long ago recently
7 sue [동] 소송하다 They will sue the big company. - go to court
8 hollow [형] 속이 빈 The old tree is hollow. solid empty
9 measure [동] 측정하다 Measure your height every year. - check size
10 domestic [형] 국내의, 가정의 I like domestic travel best. foreign local, home
11 afford [동] 여유가 되다 I cannot afford this car. - pay for
12 humidity [명] 습도 The humidity is very high here. dryness wetness
13 incoming [형] 들어오는 There is an incoming call. outgoing entering
14 striking [형] 눈에 띄는 She has striking blue eyes. normal clear, bold
15 terrify [동] 무섭게 하다 Ghost stories terrify me a lot. soothe scare
16 absence [명] 결석 His absence was very strange. presence being away
17 extent [명] 정도 I agree to some extent. - scale, range
18 stubborn [형] 완고한 My little brother is very stubborn. flexible hard-headed
19 struggle [명] 분투 Life is a long struggle. ease fight, effort
20 principal [명] 교장 Talk to the school principal. student head teacher
21 mumble [동] 중얼거리다 Do not mumble your words. shout whisper
22 immediately [부] 즉시 Please come home immediately. later right now
23 impressive [형] 인상적인 Your math score is impressive! boring great, grand
24 permission [명] 허가 Ask for permission to go. ban consent
25 transcend [동] 초월하다 Music can transcend all borders. - go beyond
26 marvelous [형] 놀라운 We had a marvelous dinner. awful wonderful
27 illustration [명] 삽화 I like the book illustration. - picture
28 unstable [형] 불안정한 The old table is unstable. steady shaky
29 scramble [동] 섞다 I will scramble the eggs. - mix
30 legendary [형] 전설적인 King Arthur is a legendary hero. unknown famous

Unit 24
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. lately ([부] 최근에)
    ① fossil② marvelous③ stubborn④ long ago
  2. terrify ([동] 무섭게 하다)
    ① illustration② thorn③ soothe④ marvelous
  3. incoming ([형] 들어오는)
    ① mumble② outgoing③ stubborn④ permission
  4. domestic ([형] 국내의, 가정의)
    ① foreign② principal③ absence④ impressive
  5. absence ([명] 결석)
    ① presence② scramble③ principal④ struggle
  6. disabled ([형] 장애를 가진)
    ① illustration② terrify③ extent④ able
  7. mumble ([동] 중얼거리다)
    ① stubborn② unstable③ afford④ shout
  8. humidity ([명] 습도)
    ① fossil② struggle③ unstable④ dryness
  9. stubborn ([형] 완고한)
    ① flexible② permission③ hollow④ scramble
  10. principal ([명] 교장)
    ① illustration② student③ terrify④ unstable
  11. permission ([명] 허가)
    ① afford② striking③ measure④ ban
  12. unstable ([형] 불안정한)
    ① mumble② disabled③ striking④ steady
  13. impressive ([형] 인상적인)
    ① boring② terrify③ hollow④ transcend
  14. immediately ([부] 즉시)
    ① scar② later③ hollow④ measure
  15. hollow ([형] 속이 빈)
    ① legendary② solid③ fossil④ impressive
  16. marvelous ([형] 놀라운)
    ① awful② disabled③ extent④ struggle
  17. striking ([형] 눈에 띄는)
    ① afford② transcend③ normal④ immediately
  18. struggle ([명] 분투)
    ① ease② scar③ incoming④ principal
  19. legendary ([형] 전설적인)
    ① unknown② extent③ illustration④ fossil
Unit 24
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. marvelous ([형] 놀라운)
    ① terrify② permission③ afford④ wonderful
  2. stubborn ([형] 완고한)
    ① marvelous② disabled③ hard-headed④ scramble
  3. thorn ([명] 가시)
    ① transcend② unstable③ measure④ spike
  4. permission ([명] 허가)
    ① disabled② marvelous③ wheat④ consent
  5. extent ([명] 정도)
    ① measure② lately③ striking④ scale
  6. impressive ([형] 인상적인)
    ① striking② fossil③ disabled④ great
  7. mumble ([동] 중얼거리다)
    ① whisper② sue③ stubborn④ legendary
  8. scramble ([동] 섞다)
    ① scar② mix③ striking④ sue
  9. sue ([동] 소송하다)
    ① extent② scar③ go to court④ marvelous
  10. humidity ([명] 습도)
    ① disabled② stubborn③ scar④ wetness
  11. illustration ([명] 삽화)
    ① scar② impressive③ picture④ incoming
  12. fossil ([명] 화석)
    ① impressive② immediately③ thorn④ old bone
  13. principal ([명] 교장)
    ① domestic② mumble③ head teacher④ extent
  14. unstable ([형] 불안정한)
    ① marvelous② humidity③ hollow④ shaky
  15. striking ([형] 눈에 띄는)
    ① clear② permission③ afford④ immediately
  16. measure ([동] 측정하다)
    ① thorn② domestic③ hollow④ check size
  17. domestic ([형] 국내의, 가정의)
    ① scramble② measure③ illustration④ local
  18. absence ([명] 결석)
    ① afford② struggle③ being away④ disabled
  19. incoming ([형] 들어오는)
    ① striking② hollow③ permission④ entering
  20. hollow ([형] 속이 빈)
    ① incoming② sue③ permission④ empty
  21. afford ([동] 여유가 되다)
    ① transcend② domestic③ pay for④ illustration
  22. transcend ([동] 초월하다)
    ① go beyond② thorn③ immediately④ struggle
  23. wheat ([명] 밀)
    ① principal② grain③ sue④ incoming
  24. legendary ([형] 전설적인)
    ① stubborn② famous③ impressive④ marvelous

    ① sue② unstable③ fight④ transcend
  26. terrify ([동] 무섭게 하다)
    ① thorn② scramble③ extent④ scare
  27. lately ([부] 최근에)
    ① transcend② recently③ illustration④ struggle
  28. scar ([명] 흉터)
    ① mark② incoming③ permission④ marvelous
  29. immediately ([부] 즉시)
    ① impressive② right now③ principal④ marvelous
Unit 25
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 decade [명] 10년 I lived here for a decade. - ten years
2 disagree [동] 의견이 다르다 Friends can disagree sometimes. agree differ
3 fountain [명] 분수 The park has a cool fountain. - water spray
4 thread [명] 실 Put the thread into the needle. - string, yarn
5 wiggle [동] 흔들다 Wiggle your toes in the water. - shake, move
6 mow [동] 깎다, 베다 Dad will mow the grass today. - cut
7 neglect [동] 방치하다 Do not neglect your small pets. care for ignore
8 reef [명] 암초 We saw a beautiful coral reef. - coral bank
9 accurate [형] 정확한 Your math answer is very accurate. wrong correct, exact
10 cause [동] 야기하다 Smoking can cause many diseases. - make, start
11 boost [동] 증진시키다 Good food will boost your energy. drop lift, help
12 contrary [형] 반대되는 He ran in a contrary way. same opposite
13 absent [형] 결석한 Why were you absent from school? present away, missing
14 skeleton [명] 골격 A human skeleton has many bones. - bones
15 pollinate [동] 수분하다 Bees pollinate the spring flowers. - fertilize
16 recognize [동] 알아보다 I did not recognize your face. forget know, spot
17 evenly [부] 고르게 Spread the jam evenly on bread. unevenly equally
18 principle [명] 원리, 원칙 We must follow the basic principle. - rule, law
19 biblical [형] 성서의 This story is a biblical one. - -
20 glow [동] 빛나다 The stars glow in the dark. - shine, beam
21 qualified [형] 자격이 있는 He is qualified for this job. unable fit, able
22 attribute [명] 속성, 자질 Patience is a great attribute. - trait, feature
23 variation [명] 변화, 차이 There is a variation in size. - change
24 defensive [형] 방어적인 The team played a defensive game. attacking guarding
25 preserve [동] 보존하다 We must preserve our old forest. destroy keep, save
26 continuous [형] 지속적인 The rain was continuous all night. broken constant
27 charitable [형] 자선의 She made a large charitable gift. mean kind, giving
28 nevertheless [부] 그럼에도 불구하고 It rained; nevertheless, we went out. - still, anyway
29 communication [명] 의사소통 Good communication is very important. - talk, contact
30 purify [동] 정화하다 Use a filter to purify water. dirty clean

학습한 날짜 :

  2. accurate ([형] 정확한)
    ① mow② glow③ cause④ wrong

  7. preserve ([동] 보존하다)

Unit 26
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 nerve [명] 신경 The brain sends signals through nerve. - -
2 scenery [명] 풍경 I love the mountain scenery here. - view
3 rare [형] 희귀한 This is a very rare bird. common unusual
4 petal [명] 꽃잎 A rose has many soft petals. - leaf
5 extend [동] 연장하다 Can we extend the lunch time? shorten lengthen
6 pursue [동] 추구하다 Pursue your dreams with hard work. quit follow, seek
7 majority [명] 다수 The majority of students like pizza. minority most
8 virtual [형] 가상의 I played a virtual reality game. real online
9 quantity [명] 양 Buy a large quantity of rice. - amount
10 odds [명] 확률 The odds of winning are high. - chance
11 donate [동] 기부하다 Please donate your old clothes today. take give, share
12 reject [동] 거절하다 Do not reject my help, please. accept say no, deny
13 release [동] 풀어 주다 Release the fish back to river. catch free, let go
14 scrub [동] 문질러 씻다 Scrub your hands with soap well. - wash, rub
15 flourish [동] 번성하다 Flowers flourish in the warm sun. die grow, bloom
16 swiftly [부] 신속히 The horse ran swiftly over grass. slowly fast, quickly
17 destiny [명] 운명 You can choose your own destiny. - fate
18 security [명] 보안 The bank has high security now. danger safety
19 cease [동] 중단하다 The rain did cease at noon. start stop, end
20 bleach [명] 표백제 Use bleach to make clothes white. - cleaner
21 thorough [형] 철저한 Give the room a thorough cleaning. careless deep, careful
22 appointment [명] 약속 I have a dental appointment today. - meeting
23 disappointed [형] 실망한 I was disappointed with my score. happy sad, upset
24 satisfactory [형] 만족스러운 Your work was very satisfactory today. poor good enough
25 philosophy [명] 철학 He studies ancient Greek philosophy now. - -
26 multiplication [명] 곱셈 We practiced multiplication in math class. division -
27 ecosystem [명] 생태계 Protect the ecosystem of the ocean. - nature
28 refreshed [형] 상쾌한 I felt refreshed after a nap. tired fresh, cool
29 electronics [명] 전자 장치 I like learning about new electronics. - devices
30 pronounce [동] 발음하다 Can you pronounce this English word? - say, speak

학습한 날짜 :

  1. refreshed ([형] 상쾌한)
    ① donate② appointment③ satisfactory④ tired
  2. majority ([명] 다수)
    ① security② minority③ satisfactory④ flourish
  3. satisfactory ([형] 만족스러운)
    ① scenery② pronounce③ odds④ poor
  4. extend ([동] 연장하다)
    ① shorten② refreshed③ pronounce④ virtual
  5. flourish ([동] 번성하다)
    ① die② petal③ majority④ reject
  6. swiftly ([부] 신속히)
    ① security② destiny③ release④ slowly
  7. reject ([동] 거절하다)
    ① cease② appointment③ accept④ pursue
  8. cease ([동] 중단하다)

  10. thorough ([형] 철저한)
    ① pursue② careless③ extend④ release

    ① happy② appointment③ extend④ flourish
  12. donate ([동] 기부하다)
    ① take② pursue③ scenery④ extend
  13. pursue ([동] 추구하다)
    ① appointment② swiftly③ extend④ quit

    ① odds② swiftly③ philosophy④ real
  15. multiplication ([명] 곱셈)
    ① rare② donate③ philosophy④ division
  16. release ([동] 풀어 주다)
    ① philosophy② catch③ pronounce④ quantity
  17. security ([명] 보안)
    ① cease② scrub③ danger④ ecosystem
