Unit 27
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 tide [명] 조수 The tide is coming in now. - sea level
2 archer [명] 궁수 The archer hit the center mark. - bowman
3 groceries [명] 식료품 Mom went to buy some groceries. - food, items
4 disease [명] 질병 Wash hands to prevent any disease. health illness, flu
5 debate [명] 토론 We had a class debate today. - talk, contest
6 notable [형] 주목할 만한 This is a notable school event. common special, famous
7 stroll [동] 거닐다 We take a stroll every evening. run walk
8 spare [형] 남는 Do you have a spare pencil? used extra
9 hazard [명] 위험 Ice on the road is a hazard. safety danger
10 shed [동] 벗다, 흘리다 Snakes shed their old skin yearly. keep drop
11 generous [형] 관대한 He is very generous with gifts. mean kind, giving
12 species [명] 종류, 종 There are many species of birds. - type, group
13 separate [동] 분리하다 Separate the trash into different bins. join split, divide
14 administer [동] 관리하다 She will administer the new test. - manage, lead
15 mustache [명] 콧수염 My uncle has a thick mustache. - facial hair
16 incident [명] 사건 It was a very strange incident. - event
17 grumpy [형] 성미가 까다로운 He is always grumpy in morning. happy angry, cross
18 facility [명] 설비, 시설 The school has a sports facility. - center, room
19 stumble [동] 비틀거리다 Be careful not to stumble here. - trip, fall
20 initial [형] 처음의 My initial idea was the best. final first
21 confront [동] 직면하다 You must confront your big fear. avoid face, meet
22 theologian [명] 신학자 He is a famous church theologian. - -
23 unforgettable [형] 잊지 못할 It was an unforgettable birthday party. boring special
24 abbreviation [명] 축약형 "TV" is an abbreviation for television. - short form
25 dedicate [동] 헌신하다 Dedicate your time to help friends. - give, devote
26 misinterpret [동] 오해하다 Do not misinterpret my words today. understand mistake
27 nonverbal [형] 비언어적인 We use nonverbal signs like waving. verbal -
28 negotiate [동] 협상하다 We must negotiate a fair price. - bargain, talk
29 customary [형] 관례의 It is customary to bow here. rare usual, normal
30 faculty [명] 능력 He has a faculty for music. - talent, skill

단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 tidy [동] 정돈하다 Please tidy your room before dinner. mess up clean up
2 habitat [명] 서식지 The forest is the bear's habitat. - home
3 dissolve [동] 녹다 Salt will dissolve in warm water. - melt
4 peek [동] 훔쳐보다 Do not peek at your gift! - look, glance
5 receipt [명] 영수증 Do you want a sales receipt? - paper
6 substance [명] 물질 This is a very sticky substance. - matter
7 fatal [형] 치명적인 It was a fatal car accident. safe deadly
8 precious [형] 소중한 My family is very precious today. cheap valuable
9 disappear [동] 사라지다 The rabbit did disappear in hole. appear vanish
10 trail [명] 등산로 Follow the trail in the forest. - path, way
11 coward [명] 겁쟁이 Don't be such a little coward. hero -
12 funeral [명] 장례식 We went to my grandfather's funeral. - -
13 poach [동] 밀렵하다 It is illegal to poach tigers. - steal animals
14 crater [명] 분화구 The moon has many large craters. - hole
15 carving [명] 조각 Look at this wood carving fish. - shape, figure
16 discard [동] 버리다 Discard your old shoes right now. keep throw away
17 informant [명] 정보 제공자 The police has a secret informant. - helper
18 injustice [명] 부당함 We must fight against any injustice. justice unfairness
19 obstacle [명] 장애물 We jumped over the small obstacle. - barrier, block
20 dictate [동] 받아쓰게 하다 I will dictate the new words. - say aloud
21 architecture [명] 건축 I like the ancient Greek architecture. - building style
22 unfortunately [부] 유감스럽게도 Unfortunately, the shop was closed today. luckily unluckily
23 negligence [명] 부주의 The fire was caused by negligence. care carelessness
24 publicize [동] 알리다 They will publicize the new show. hide promote
25 exhilarating [형] 아주 신나는 It was an exhilarating bike ride. boring exciting
26 accomplish [동] 성취하다 You can accomplish any hard goal. fail finish, reach
27 extraordinary [형] 특별한 He has an extraordinary singing talent. normal special, amazing
28 prestigious [형] 명성이 있는 This is a very prestigious school. unknown famous, top
29 archaeologist [명] 고고학자 An archaeologist finds old buried treasures. - -
30 embrace [동] 포옹하다 They embrace each other with joy. - hug, accept

학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. fatal ([형] 치명적인)
    ① archaeologist② injustice③ safe④ obstacle
  2. disappear ([동] 사라지다)
    ① peek② unfortunately③ appear④ funeral
  3. precious ([형] 소중한)
    ① cheap② funeral③ carving④ poach
  4. extraordinary ([형] 특별한)
    ① normal② peek③ architecture④ tidy
  5. unfortunately ([부] 유감스럽게도)
    ① luckily② publicize③ injustice④ disappear
  6. discard ([동] 버리다)
    ① dictate② keep③ dissolve④ unfortunately
  7. injustice ([명] 부당함)
    ① obstacle② justice③ exhilarating④ substance
  8. tidy ([동] 정돈하다)
    ① trail② mess up③ disappear④ obstacle
  9. publicize ([동] 알리다)
    ① discard② dictate③ negligence④ hide
  10. coward ([명] 겁쟁이)
    ① hero② discard③ dictate④ peek
  11. prestigious ([형] 명성이 있는)
    ① peek② unknown③ tidy④ publicize
  12. accomplish ([동] 성취하다)
    ① embrace② extraordinary③ fail④ habitat
  13. exhilarating ([형] 아주 신나는)
    ① obstacle② disappear③ dictate④ boring
  14. negligence ([명] 부주의)
    ① obstacle② habitat③ exhilarating④ care

Unit 29
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 height [명] 높이, 키 What is your current total height? - tallness
2 tightly [부] 꽉 Hold my hand very tightly, please. loosely firmly
3 refuse [동] 거부하다 I refuse to eat cold soup. accept say no
4 loan [명] 대출 I need a small bank loan. - debt
5 disturb [동] 방해하다 Do not disturb my sleeping baby. - annoy, bother
6 snatch [동] 잡아채다 Don't snatch the toy from me! - grab
7 access [명] 접근 You have access to this room. - entry
8 mortal [형] 죽을 운명의 All humans are mortal, you know. eternal -
9 swish [동] 휙 소리 내다 The cat's tail did swish slowly. - -
10 resolution [명] 결심 My New Year resolution is exercise. - goal, plan
11 sustain [동] 유지하다 Trees sustain life on our Earth. - keep, hold
12 reckless [형] 무모한 Stop that reckless bike riding now. careful careless
13 isolate [동] 고립시키다 Isolate the sick bird from others. join separate
14 compost [명] 퇴비 Use compost for your small garden. - fertilizer
15 diameter [명] 지름 Measure the diameter of this circle. - -
16 scatter [동] 흩뿌리다 Scatter the seeds on the ground. gather spread
17 chubby [형] 통통한 The baby has very chubby legs. thin plump
18 durable [형] 튼튼한 These boots are very durable today. weak strong
19 hilarious [형] 유쾌한 That clown was truly hilarious today! serious very funny
20 trace [명] 흔적 There is no trace of him. - mark, sign
21 saliva [명] 침 Saliva helps us to eat food. - spit
22 questionnaire [명] 설문지 Please fill out this short questionnaire. - survey
23 collapse [동] 붕괴되다 The old bridge might collapse soon. - fall down
24 recover [동] 회복하다 I hope you recover very soon. - get well
25 astonish [동] 놀라게 하다 Your magic will astonish all kids. - surprise
26 competent [형] 유능한 She is a very competent doctor. unable able, fit
27 spectacular [형] 장관의 The firework show was spectacular today. boring amazing
28 overalls [명] 작업복 Wear your blue overalls for gardening. - pants
29 performance [명] 공연 We enjoyed your piano performance today. - show
30 sophisticated [형] 세련된 This is a very sophisticated robot. simple modern, smart

Unit 29
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. durable ([형] 튼튼한)
    ① access② compost③ overalls④ weak
  2. scatter ([동] 흩뿌리다)
    ① compost② gather③ diameter④ access
  3. reckless ([형] 무모한)
    ① resolution② snatch③ careful④ sustain
  4. refuse ([동] 거부하다)
    ① astonish② accept③ collapse④ isolate
  5. isolate ([동] 고립시키다)
    ① join② resolution③ competent④ astonish
  6. mortal ([형] 죽을 운명의)
    ① eternal② astonish③ reckless④ snatch
  7. chubby ([형] 통통한)
    ① diameter② sophisticated③ thin④ refuse
  8. competent ([형] 유능한)
    ① compost② unable③ access④ mortal
  9. sophisticated ([형] 세련된)
    ① access② height③ competent④ simple
  10. tightly ([부] 꽉)
    ① loosely② isolate③ resolution④ height
  11. spectacular ([형] 장관의)
    ① overalls② durable③ competent④ boring
  12. hilarious ([형] 유쾌한)
    ① recover② serious③ trace④ scatter
Unit 29
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. height ([명] 높이, 키)
    ① questionnaire② resolution③ diameter④ tallness
  2. durable ([형] 튼튼한)
    ① strong② saliva③ hilarious④ mortal
  3. loan ([명] 대출)
    ① refuse② debt③ height④ spectacular
  4. snatch ([동] 잡아채다)
    ① chubby② tightly③ grab④ disturb
  5. compost ([명] 퇴비)
    ① resolution② fertilizer③ chubby④ performance
  6. collapse ([동] 붕괴되다)
    ① access② sustain③ questionnaire④ fall down
  7. disturb ([동] 방해하다)
    ① saliva② scatter③ compost④ annoy
  8. chubby ([형] 통통한)
    ① mortal② snatch③ spectacular④ plump
  9. questionnaire ([명] 설문지)
    ① survey② competent③ spectacular④ swish
  10. tightly ([부] 꽉)
    ① resolution② reckless③ hilarious④ firmly
  11. scatter ([동] 흩뿌리다)
    ① competent② compost③ questionnaire④ spread
  12. reckless ([형] 무모한)
    ① scatter② careless③ durable④ saliva
  13. sophisticated ([형] 세련된)
    ① competent② compost③ modern④ recover
  14. isolate ([동] 고립시키다)
    ① access② separate③ disturb④ snatch
  15. recover ([동] 회복하다)
    ① hilarious② access③ get well④ performance
  16. performance ([명] 공연)
    ① mortal② diameter③ scatter④ show
  17. competent ([형] 유능한)
    ① height② able③ disturb④ durable
  18. saliva ([명] 침)
    ① spit② chubby③ durable④ diameter
  19. astonish ([동] 놀라게 하다)
    ① access② surprise③ recover④ swish
  20. resolution ([명] 결심)
    ① questionnaire② diameter③ refuse④ goal
  21. trace ([명] 흔적)
    ① loan② mark③ sustain④ performance

    ① say no② tightly③ competent④ compost

    ① compost② entry③ tightly④ collapse

    ① trace② very funny③ diameter④ snatch

    ① compost② keep③ diameter④ recover
  26. overalls ([명] 작업복)
    ① refuse② hilarious③ pants④ sophisticated
  27. spectacular ([형] 장관의)
    ① amazing② competent③ compost④ mortal
Unit 30
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 aisle [명] 통로 Walk down the grocery store aisle. - path, way
2 chuckle [동] 빙그레 웃다 He gave a quiet, little chuckle. - laugh
3 divide [동] 나누다 Divide the cake into four pieces. join split
4 picky [형] 까다로운 He is very picky about food. - choosy
5 grid [명] 격자무늬 Draw a map on the grid. - pattern
6 sprain [동] 삐다 Did you sprain your left ankle? - twist
7 perfume [명] 향수 This perfume has a floral smell. - scent
8 represent [동] 나타내다 Red can represent love and fire. - show
9 consent [동] 동의하다 Parents must consent to this trip. refuse agree
10 tilt [동] 기울다 Tilt your head to the side. level tip, lean
11 curse [명] 저주 The witch put a dark curse. blessing spell
12 ingest [동] 섭취하다 Do not ingest this old medicine. - eat, take in
13 dimensional [형] ~차원의 We watched a three dimensional movie. - -
14 convert [동] 바꾸다 Convert these dollars into Korean won. - change
15 celestial [형] 천체의 The moon is a celestial body. - starry
16 underfed [형] 영양 부족의 The stray dog looked very underfed. full hungry
17 evaluate [동] 평가하다 Let's evaluate your math test score. - judge, check
18 cooperate [동] 협력하다 Students must cooperate to win games. - work together
19 frequently [부] 자주 I go to the library frequently. rarely often
20 reserve [동] 예약하다 Reserve a table for dinner tonight. - book
21 expedition [명] 탐험 We went on a polar expedition. - trip, journey
22 intellectual [형] 지적인 He likes deep intellectual books. stupid smart
23 international [형] 국제적인 This is an international school event. local global
24 excavation [명] 발굴 I visited the old city excavation. - digging
25 superstition [명] 미신 That is just an old superstition. - belief
26 magnificent [형] 굉장한 The castle view was truly magnificent. awful great, grand
27 investigate [동] 조사하다 The police will investigate the case. ignore check, study
28 appropriate [형] 적절한 Wear appropriate clothes for school today. wrong fit, right
29 contribute [동] 기여하다 Please contribute your ideas to us. - help, give
30 influence [명] 영향 Books have a great influence. - effect
Unit 30
쓰기 연습Write & Remember

13 chuckle [동] 빙그레 웃다
14 magnificent [형] 굉장한
15 cooperate [동] 협력하다
16 influence [명] 영향
17 international [형] 국제적인
18 evaluate [동] 평가하다
19 perfume [명] 향수
20 superstition [명] 미신

  22. The witch put a dark . ([명] 저주)

반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. tilt ([동] 기울다)
    ① divide② celestial③ magnificent④ level
  2. divide ([동] 나누다)
    ① celestial② join③ dimensional④ frequently

    ① aisle② blessing③ contribute④ intellectual
  4. underfed ([형] 영양 부족의)
    ① full② contribute③ grid④ superstition
  5. intellectual ([형] 지적인)

    ① celestial② local③ chuckle④ tilt
